complete simulator state\n89\tfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) GetState(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n90\t\th.mu.RLock()\n91\t\tdefer h.mu.RUnlock()\n92\t\n93\t\tstate := state)\n100\t}\n101\t\n102\t// Reset resets the simulator to default state\n103\tfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) Reset(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n104\t\th.mu.Lock()\n105\t\tdefer h.mu.Unlock()\n106\t\n107\t\th.space = simulator.DefaultSpace()\n108\t\th.nodes = simulator.NewNodeSet()\n109\t\th.walkers = simulator.NewWalkerSet()\n110\t\n111\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]string{\"status\": \"reset\"})\n112\t}\n113\t\n114\t// CreateSession creates a new simulator session\n115\tfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) CreateSession(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request)   h.space,\n142\t\t})\n143\t}\n144\t\n145\t// GetSpace returns the current space definition\n146\tfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) GetSpace(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n359\t\t\th.walkers.Add(w)\n360\t\t}\n361\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n362\t\n363\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusCreated, walkers.All())\n364\t}\n365\t\n366\t// RemoveWalker removes a walker\n367\tfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) RemoveWalker(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n368\t\twalkerID := chi.URLParam(r, \"walkerID\")\n369\t\n370\t\th.mu.Lock()\n371\t\tremoved := computation\n383\ttype GDOPRequest struct {\n384\t\tCellSize  float64 `json:\"cell_size\"`  // Grid cell size in meters\n385\t\tMaxZone   int     `json:\"max_zone\"`   // Maximum Fresnel zone to consider\n386\t\tThreshold float64 `json:\"threshold\"`  // DeltaRMS threshold for active links\n387\t}\n388\t\n389\t// GDOPResponse contains GDOP computation results\n390\ttype GDOPResponse struct {\n391\t\tResults        [][]simulator.GDOPResult `json:\"results\"`\n392\t\tCoverageScore  float64                   `json:\"coverage_score\"`\n393\t\tAverageGDOP    float64                   `json:\"average_gdop\"`\n394\t\tQualityCounts  map[string]int            `json:\"quality_counts\"`\n395\t\tDeadZones      []simulator.Point         `json:\"dead_zones\"`\n396\t\tRecommendedPos simulator.Point          `json:\"recommended_position\"`\n397\t\tLinks          []simulator.Link          `json:\"links\"`\n398\t}\n399\t\n400\t// ComputeGDOP computes GDOP for the current configuration\n401\tfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) ComputeGDOP(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n402\t\tvar req GDOPRequest\n403\t\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n404\t\t\t// Use defaults if request body is empty\n405\t\t\treq = GDOPRequest{\n406\t\t\t\tCellSize:  0.2,\n407\t\t\t\tMaxZone:   3,\n408\t\t\t\tThreshold: 0.02,\n409\t\t\t}\n410\t\t}\n411\t\n412\t\th.mu.RLock()\n413\t\tspace := h.space\n414\t\tnodes := h.nodes\n415\t\th.mu.RUnlock()\n416\t\n417\t\tif nodes.Count() < 2 {\n418\t\t\trespondError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, \"need at least 2 nodes for GDOP computation\")\n419\t\t\treturn\n420\t\t}\n421\t\n422\t\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, _ := space.Bounds()\n423\t\n424\t\t// Generate links\n425\t\tlinks := simulator.GenerateAllLinks(nodes)\n426\t\n427\t\t// Create GDOP computer\n428\t\tconfig := simulator.GridConfig{\n429\t\t\tMinX:     minX,\n430\t\t\tMinY:     minY,\n431\t\t\tWidth:    maxX - minX,\n432\t\t\tDepth:    maxY - minY,\n433\t\t\tCellSize: req.CellSize,\n434\t\t}\n435\t\tgdopComp := simulator.NewGDOPComputer(links, config)\n436\t\tif req.MaxZone > 0 {\n437\t\t\tgdopComp.SetMaxZone(req.MaxZone)\n438\t\t}\n439\t\n440\t\t// Compute GDOP\n441\t\tresults := gdopComp.ComputeAll()\n442\t\n443\t\t// Compute statistics\n444\t\tcoverageScore := gdopComp.CoverageScore(results)\n445\t\tavgGDOP := gdopComp.AverageGDOP(results)\n446\t\tqualityCounts := gdopComp.QualityCounts(results)\n447\t\tdeadZones := gdopComp.FindDeadZones(results)\n448\t\trecommendedPos := gdopComp.RecommendNodePosition(results, space)\n449\t\n450\t\tresponse := GDOPResponse{\n451\t\t\tResults:        results,\n452\t\t\tCoverageScore:  coverageScore,\n453\t\t\tAverageGDOP:    avgGDOP,\n454\t\t\tQualityCounts:  qualityCounts,\n455\t\t\tDeadZones:      deadZones,\n456\t\t\tRecommendedPos: recommendedPos,\n457\t\t\tLinks:          links,\n458\t\t}\n459\t\n460\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, response)\n461\t}\n462\t\n463\t// GetCoverageScore returns just the coverage score for quick assessment\n464\tfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) GetCoverageScore(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n465\t\th.mu.RLock()\n466\t\tspace := h.space\n467\t\tnodes := h.nodes\n468\t\th.mu.RUnlock()\n469\t\n470\t\tif nodes.Count() < 2 {\n471\t\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n472\t\t\t\t\"coverage_percent\": 0,\n473\t\t\t\t\"minimum_nodes\":    simulator.MinimumNodeCount(space, 4.0),\n474\t\t\t\t\"current_nodes\":    nodes.Count(),\n475\t\t\t})\n476\t\t\treturn\n477\t\t}\n478\t\n479\t\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, _ := returns GDOP data in a format suitable for heatmap visualization\n501\tfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) GetGDOPHeatmap(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n502\t\th.mu.RLock()\n503\t\tspace := h.space\n504\t\tnodes := h.nodes\n505\t\th.mu.RUnlock()\n506\t\n507\t\tif nodes.Count() < 2 {\n508\t\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n509\t\t\t\t\"gdop_map\":         []float64{},\n510\t\t\t\t\"grid_dimensions\": []int{0, 0, 0},\n511\t\t\t\t\"coverage_percent\": 0,\n512\t\t\t\t\"error\":            \"need at least 2 nodes\",\n513\t\t\t})\n514\t\t\treturn\n515\t\t}\n516\t\n517\t\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, _ := space.Bounds()\n518\t\tlinks := simulator.GenerateAllLinks(nodes)\n519\t\n520\t\tconfig := simulator.GridConfig{\n521\t\t\tMinX:     minX,\n522\t\t\tMinY:     minY,\n523\t\t\tWidth:    maxX - minX,\n524\t\t\tDepth:    maxY - minY,\n525\t\t\tCellSize: 0.2,\n526\t\t}\n527\t\tgdopComp := simulator.NewGDOPComputer(links, config)\n528\t\tresults := gdopComp.ComputeAll()\n529\t\n530\t\t// Convert results to heatmap format\n531\t\tdepth := len(results)\n532\t\twidth := 0\n533\t\tif depth > 0 {\n534\t\t\twidth = len(results[0])\n535\t\t}\n536\t\n537\t\t// Flatten GDOP values into 1D array (row-major order)\n538\t\tgdopMap := make([]float64, width*depth)\n539\t\tfor y := 0; y < depth; y++ {\n540\t\t\tfor x := 0; x < width; x++ {\n541\t\t\t\tidx := y*width + x\n542\t\t\t\tif math.IsInf(results[y][x].GDOP, 0) {\n543\t\t\t\t\tgdopMap[idx] = 9999.0 // Use 9999 to represent infinity\n544\t\t\t\t} else {\n545\t\t\t\t\tgdopMap[idx] = results[y][x].GDOP\n546\t\t\t\t}\n547\t\t\t}\n548\t\t}\n549\t\n550\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n551\t\t\t\"gdop_map\":         gdopMap,\n552\t\t\t\"grid_dimensions\": []int{width, depth, 1}, // 2D heatmap, so height = 1\n553\t\t\t\"coverage_percent\": gdopComp.CoverageScore(results),\n554\t\t\t\"average_gdop\":     gdopComp.AverageGDOP(results),\n555\t\t\t\"quality_counts\":   gdopComp.QualityCounts(results),\n556\t\t})\n557\t}\n558\t\n559\t// SimulationRequest contains parameters for running a simulation\n571\ttype SimulationRequest struct {\n572\t\tDurationSec int     `json:\"duration_sec\"` // Simulation duration in seconds\n573\t\tRateHz      int     `json:\"rate_hz\"`      // Update rate in Hz\n574\t\tThreshold   float64 `json:\"threshold\"`    // DeltaRMS threshold\n575\t}\n576\t\n577\t// SimulationResponse contains simulation results\n578\ttype SimulationResponse struct {\n579\t\tWalkerPositions []simulator.Point `json:\"walker_positions\"`\n580\t\tLinkActivity    map[string]float64 `json:\"link_activity\"`\n581\t\tDuration        int                `json:\"duration\"`\n582\t\tTicks           int                `json:\"ticks\"`\n583\t}\n584\t\n585\t// RunSimulation runs a time-step simulation with the current configuration\n586\tfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) RunSimulation(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n587\t\tvar req SimulationRequest\n588\t\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n589\t\t\treq = SimulationRequest{\n590\t\t\t\tDurationSec: 10,\n591\t\t\t\tRateHz:      10,\n592\t\t\t\tThreshold:   0.02,\n593\t\t\t}\n594\t\t}\n595\t\n596\t\th.mu.RLock()\n597\t\tspace := h.space\n598\t\tnodes := h.nodes\n599\t\twalkers := h.walkers\n600\t\th.mu.RUnlock()\n601\t\n602\t\tif walkers.Count() == 0 {\n603\t\t\trespondError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, \"no walkers in simulation\")\n604\t\t\treturn\n605\t\t}\n606\t\n607\t\tif nodes.Count() < 2 {\n608\t\t\trespondError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, \"need at least 2 nodes for simulation\")\n609\t\t\treturn\n610\t\t}\n611\t\n612\t\t// Create propagation model\n613\t\tpropModel := simulator.NewPropagationModel(space)\n614\t\n615\t\t// Generate all links\n616\t\tlinks := simulator.GenerateAllLinks(nodes)\n617\t\n618\t\t// Run simulation ticks\n619\t\tdt := 1.0 / float64(req.RateHz)\n620\t\tnumTicks := req.DurationSec * req.RateHz\n621\t\n622\t\t// Collect final positions and link activity\n623\t\tfinalPositions := make([]simulator.Point, 0)\n624\t\tlinkActivity := make(map[string]float64)\n625\t\n626\t\tfor tick := 0; tick < numTicks; tick++ {\n627\t\t\t// Update walker positions\n628\t\t\twalkers.Update(dt, space)\n629\t\n630\t\t\t// Compute link activity\n631\t\t\tfor _, link := range links {\n632\t\t\t\tlinkID := link.TX.ID + \":\" + link.RX.ID\n633\t\t\t\tmaxDelta := 0.0\n634\t\n635\t\t\t\tfor _, walker := range walkers.All() {\n636\t\t\t\t\tdelta := propModel.ComputeLinkActivity(link, walker.Position, req.Threshold)\n637\t\t\t\t\tif delta > maxDelta {\n638\t\t\t\t\t\tmaxDelta = delta\n639\t\t\t\t\t}\n640\t\t\t\t}\n641\t\n642\t\t\t\tif maxDelta > linkActivity[linkID] {\n643\t\t\t\t\tlinkActivity[linkID] = maxDelta\n644\t\t\t\t}\n645\t\t\t}\n646\t\t}\n647\t\n648\t\t// Collect final walker positions\n649\t\tfor _, w := range walkers.All() {\n650\t\t\tfinalPositions = append(finalPositions, w.Position)\n651\t\t}\n652\t\n653\t\tresponse := SimulationResponse{\n654\t\t\tWalkerPositions: finalPositions,\n655\t\t\tLinkActivity:    linkActivity,\n656\t\t\tDuration:        req.DurationSec,\n657\t\t\tTicks:           numTicks,\n658\t\t}\n659\t\n660\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, response)\n661\t}\n662\t\n663\t// Helper functions\n664\t\n665\tfunc getBoundsJSON(space *simulator.Space) map[string]float64 {\n666\t\tminX, minY, minZ, maxX, maxY, maxZ := space.Bounds()\n667\t\treturn map[string]float64{\n668\t\t\t\"min_x\": minX,\n669\t\t\t\"min_y\": minY,\n670\t\t\t\"min_z\": minZ,\n671\t\t\t\"max_x\": maxX,\n672\t\t\t\"max_y\": maxY,\n673\t\t\t\"max_z\": maxZ,\n674\t\t}\n675\t}\n676\t\n677\tfunc respondJSON(w http.ResponseWriter, status int, data interface{}) {\n678\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")\n679\t\tw.WriteHeader(status)\n680\t\tif err := json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(data); err != nil {\n681\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[ERROR] Failed to encode JSON response: %v\", err)\n682\t\t}\n683\t}\n684\t\n685\tfunc respondError(w http.ResponseWriter, status int, message string) {\n686\t\trespondJSON(w, status, map[string]string{\"error\": message})\n687\t}\n688\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"6b3b417b-ffca-4e51-853f-9cbdc68e2df1","uuid":"039a5f91-6677-4af8-8aff-e7bbc9a3f84a","timestamp":"2026-05-06T03:25:06.042Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/home/coding/spaxel/mothership/internal/api/simulator.go","content":"// Package api provides REST API handlers for Spaxel simulator.\npackage api\n\nimport (\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"log\"\n\t\"math\"\n\t\"net/http\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/go-chi/chi/v5\"\n\t\"github.com/spaxel/mothership/internal/simulator\"\n)\n\n// SimulatorHandler manages pre-deployment simulation API endpoints.\n// It allows users to define virtual spaces, place virtual nodes, simulate walkers,\n// and compute GDOP coverage quality before purchasing hardware.\ntype SimulatorHandler struct {\n\tmu       sync.RWMutex\n\tspace    *simulator.Space\n\tnodes    *simulator.NodeSet\n\twalkers  *simulator.WalkerSet\n}\n\n// NewSimulatorHandler creates a new simulator handler.\nfunc NewSimulatorHandler() *SimulatorHandler {\n\t// Start with a default space\n\treturn &SimulatorHandler{\n\t\tspace:   simulator.DefaultSpace(),\n\t\tnodes:   simulator.NewNodeSet(),\n\t\twalkers: simulator.NewWalkerSet(),\n\t}\n}\n\n// RegisterRoutes registers simulator routes on the router.\nfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) RegisterRoutes(r chi.Router) {\n\tr.Route(\"/simulator\", func(r chi.Router) {\n\t\tr.Get(\"/\", h.GetState)\n\t\tr.Post(\"/reset\", h.Reset)\n\t\tr.Post(\"/session\", h.CreateSession)\n\n\t\t// Space management\n\t\tr.Route(\"/space\", func(r chi.Router) {\n\t\t\tr.Get(\"/\", h.GetSpace)\n\t\t\tr.Put(\"/\", h.SetSpace)\n\t\t\tr.Post(\"/validate\", h.ValidateSpace)\n\t\t})\n\n\t\t// Node management\n\t\tr.Route(\"/nodes\", func(r chi.Router) {\n\t\t\tr.Get(\"/\", h.GetNodes)\n\t\t\tr.Post(\"/\", h.AddNode)\n\t\t\tr.Route(\"/{nodeID}\", func(r chi.Router) {\n\t\t\t\tr.Delete(\"/\", h.RemoveNode)\n\t\t\t\tr.Put(\"/\", h.UpdateNode)\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t\tr.Post(\"/suggest\", h.SuggestNodes)\n\t\t\tr.Post(\"/optimize\", h.OptimizeNodes)\n\t\t})\n\n\t\t// Walker management\n\t\tr.Route(\"/walkers\", func(r chi.Router) {\n\t\t\tr.Get(\"/\", h.GetWalkers)\n\t\t\tr.Post(\"/\", h.AddWalker)\n\t\t\tr.Post(\"/random\", h.AddRandomWalkers)\n\t\t\tr.Post(\"/path\", h.AddPathWalkers)\n\t\t\tr.Delete(\"/{walkerID}\", h.RemoveWalker)\n\t\t})\n\n\t\t// GDOP computation\n\t\tr.Route(\"/gdop\", func(r chi.Router) {\n\t\t\tr.Post(\"/compute\", h.ComputeGDOP)\n\t\t\tr.Get(\"/coverage\", h.GetCoverageScore)\n\t\t\tr.Get(\"/heatmap\", h.GetGDOPHeatmap)\n\t\t})\n\n\t\t// Shopping list\n\t\tr.Get(\"/shopping-list\", h.GetShoppingList)\n\n\t\t// Simulation\n\t\tr.Post(\"/simulate\", h.RunSimulation)\n\t})\n}\n\n// GetState returns the complete simulator state\nfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) GetState(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tdefer h.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tstate := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"space\":   h.space,\n\t\t\"nodes\":   h.nodes.All(),\n\t\t\"walkers\": h.walkers.All(),\n\t}\n\n\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, state)\n}\n\n// Reset resets the simulator to default state\nfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) Reset(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer h.mu.Unlock()\n\n\th.space = simulator.DefaultSpace()\n\th.nodes = simulator.NewNodeSet()\n\th.walkers = simulator.NewWalkerSet()\n\n\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]string{\"status\": \"reset\"})\n}\n\n// CreateSession creates a new simulator session\nfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) CreateSession(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tvar req struct {\n\t\tSpace *simulator.Space `json:\"space\"`\n\t}\n\n\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n\t\t// Use default space if request body is empty/invalid\n\t\treq.Space = simulator.DefaultSpace()\n\t}\n\n\tif req.Space == nil {\n\t\treq.Space = simulator.DefaultSpace()\n\t}\n\n\t// Update the handler's space if provided\n\tif req.Space != nil {\n\t\th.mu.Lock()\n\t\th.space = req.Space\n\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n\t}\n\n\t// Generate session ID\n\tsessionID := fmt.Sprintf(\"sim_%d\", time.Now().UnixNano())\n\n\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"session_id\": sessionID,\n\t\t\"space\":      h.space,\n\t})\n}\n\n// GetSpace returns the current space definition\nfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) GetSpace(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tdefer h.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, h.space)\n}\n\n// SetSpace updates the space definition\nfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) SetSpace(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tvar space simulator.Space\n\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&space); err != nil {\n\t\trespondError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, \"invalid space JSON\")\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif err := space.Validate(); err != nil {\n\t\trespondError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, err.Error())\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\th.space = &space\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n\n\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]string{\"status\": \"updated\"})\n}\n\n// ValidateSpace validates the current space without modifying it\nfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) ValidateSpace(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tdefer h.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif err := h.space.Validate(); err != nil {\n\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\"valid\": false,\n\t\t\t\"error\": err.Error(),\n\t\t})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"valid\":       true,\n\t\t\"volume_m3\":   h.space.TotalVolume(),\n\t\t\"bounds\":      getBoundsJSON(h.space),\n\t\t\"room_count\":  len(h.space.Rooms),\n\t\t\"wall_count\":  len(h.space.GetWalls()),\n\t})\n}\n\n// GetNodes returns all virtual nodes\nfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) GetNodes(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tdefer h.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, h.nodes.All())\n}\n\n// AddNode adds a new virtual node\nfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) AddNode(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tvar node simulator.Node\n\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&node); err != nil {\n\t\trespondError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, \"invalid node JSON\")\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\th.nodes.Add(&node)\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n\n\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusCreated, node)\n}\n\n// UpdateNode updates an existing node\nfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) UpdateNode(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tnodeID := chi.URLParam(r, \"nodeID\")\n\n\tvar node simulator.Node\n\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&node); err != nil {\n\t\trespondError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, \"invalid node JSON\")\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tnode.ID = nodeID // Ensure ID matches URL parameter\n\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\t// Remove old node and add updated one\n\th.nodes.Remove(nodeID)\n\th.nodes.Add(&node)\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n\n\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, node)\n}\n\n// RemoveNode removes a virtual node\nfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) RemoveNode(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tnodeID := chi.URLParam(r, \"nodeID\")\n\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\tremoved := h.nodes.Remove(nodeID)\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tif !removed {\n\t\trespondError(w, http.StatusNotFound, \"node not found\")\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]string{\"status\": \"removed\"})\n}\n\n// SuggestNodes suggests optimal node positions for the current space\nfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) SuggestNodes(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\t// Parse count from query string\n\tcountStr := r.URL.Query().Get(\"count\")\n\tcount, err := strconv.Atoi(countStr)\n\tif err != nil || count < 1 {\n\t\tcount = 4 // Default to 4 nodes\n\t}\n\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tspace := h.space\n\th.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tsuggested := simulator.SuggestedNodes(space, count)\n\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, suggested.All())\n}\n\n// OptimizeNodes optimizes node positions for best coverage\nfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) OptimizeNodes(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\t// Parse parameters\n\tcountStr := r.URL.Query().Get(\"count\")\n\tcount, err := strconv.Atoi(countStr)\n\tif err != nil || count < 1 {\n\t\tcount = 4\n\t}\n\n\titerationsStr := r.URL.Query().Get(\"iterations\")\n\titerations, err := strconv.Atoi(iterationsStr)\n\tif err != nil || iterations < 1 {\n\t\titerations = 50 // Default iterations\n\t}\n\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tspace := h.space\n\th.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\toptimized := simulator.OptimizeNodePositions(space, count, iterations)\n\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, optimized.All())\n}\n\n// GetWalkers returns all walkers\nfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) GetWalkers(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tdefer h.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, h.walkers.All())\n}\n\n// AddWalker adds a new walker\nfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) AddWalker(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tvar walker simulator.Walker\n\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&walker); err != nil {\n\t\trespondError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, \"invalid walker JSON\")\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\th.walkers.Add(&walker)\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n\n\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusCreated, walker)\n}\n\n// AddRandomWalkers adds random walkers to the simulation\nfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) AddRandomWalkers(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\t// Parse count from query string\n\tcountStr := r.URL.Query().Get(\"count\")\n\tcount, err := strconv.Atoi(countStr)\n\tif err != nil || count < 1 {\n\t\tcount = 1\n\t}\n\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tspace := h.space\n\th.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\twalkers := simulator.CreateRandomWalkers(count, space)\n\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\tfor _, w := range walkers.All() {\n\t\th.walkers.Add(w)\n\t}\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n\n\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusCreated, walkers.All())\n}\n\n// AddPathWalkers adds path-following walkers\nfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) AddPathWalkers(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\t// Parse count from query string\n\tcountStr := r.URL.Query().Get(\"count\")\n\tcount, err := strconv.Atoi(countStr)\n\tif err != nil || count < 1 {\n\t\tcount = 1\n\t}\n\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tspace := h.space\n\th.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\twalkers := simulator.CreatePathWalkers(count, space)\n\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\tfor _, w := range walkers.All() {\n\t\th.walkers.Add(w)\n\t}\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n\n\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusCreated, walkers.All())\n}\n\n// RemoveWalker removes a walker\nfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) RemoveWalker(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\twalkerID := chi.URLParam(r, \"walkerID\")\n\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\tremoved := h.walkers.Remove(walkerID)\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tif !removed {\n\t\trespondError(w, http.StatusNotFound, \"walker not found\")\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]string{\"status\": \"removed\"})\n}\n\n// GDOPRequest contains parameters for GDOP computation\ntype GDOPRequest struct {\n\tCellSize  float64 `json:\"cell_size\"`  // Grid cell size in meters\n\tMaxZone   int     `json:\"max_zone\"`   // Maximum Fresnel zone to consider\n\tThreshold float64 `json:\"threshold\"`  // DeltaRMS threshold for active links\n}\n\n// GDOPResponse contains GDOP computation results\ntype GDOPResponse struct {\n\tResults        [][]simulator.GDOPResult `json:\"results\"`\n\tCoverageScore  float64                   `json:\"coverage_score\"`\n\tAverageGDOP    float64                   `json:\"average_gdop\"`\n\tQualityCounts  map[string]int            `json:\"quality_counts\"`\n\tDeadZones      []simulator.Point         `json:\"dead_zones\"`\n\tRecommendedPos simulator.Point          `json:\"recommended_position\"`\n\tLinks          []simulator.Link          `json:\"links\"`\n}\n\n// ComputeGDOP computes GDOP for the current configuration\nfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) ComputeGDOP(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tvar req GDOPRequest\n\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n\t\t// Use defaults if request body is empty\n\t\treq = GDOPRequest{\n\t\t\tCellSize:  0.2,\n\t\t\tMaxZone:   3,\n\t\t\tThreshold: 0.02,\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tspace := h.space\n\tnodes := h.nodes\n\th.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif nodes.Count() < 2 {\n\t\trespondError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, \"need at least 2 nodes for GDOP computation\")\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, _ := space.Bounds()\n\n\t// Generate links\n\tlinks := simulator.GenerateAllLinks(nodes)\n\n\t// Create GDOP computer\n\tconfig := simulator.GridConfig{\n\t\tMinX:     minX,\n\t\tMinY:     minY,\n\t\tWidth:    maxX - minX,\n\t\tDepth:    maxY - minY,\n\t\tCellSize: req.CellSize,\n\t}\n\tgdopComp := simulator.NewGDOPComputer(links, config)\n\tif req.MaxZone > 0 {\n\t\tgdopComp.SetMaxZone(req.MaxZone)\n\t}\n\n\t// Compute GDOP\n\tresults := gdopComp.ComputeAll()\n\n\t// Compute statistics\n\tcoverageScore := gdopComp.CoverageScore(results)\n\tavgGDOP := gdopComp.AverageGDOP(results)\n\tqualityCounts := gdopComp.QualityCounts(results)\n\tdeadZones := gdopComp.FindDeadZones(results)\n\trecommendedPos := gdopComp.RecommendNodePosition(results, space)\n\n\tresponse := GDOPResponse{\n\t\tResults:        results,\n\t\tCoverageScore:  coverageScore,\n\t\tAverageGDOP:    avgGDOP,\n\t\tQualityCounts:  qualityCounts,\n\t\tDeadZones:      deadZones,\n\t\tRecommendedPos: recommendedPos,\n\t\tLinks:          links,\n\t}\n\n\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, response)\n}\n\n// GetCoverageScore returns just the coverage score for quick assessment\nfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) GetCoverageScore(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tspace := h.space\n\tnodes := h.nodes\n\th.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif nodes.Count() < 2 {\n\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\"coverage_percent\": 0,\n\t\t\t\"minimum_nodes\":    simulator.MinimumNodeCount(space, 4.0),\n\t\t\t\"current_nodes\":    nodes.Count(),\n\t\t})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, _ := space.Bounds()\n\tlinks := simulator.GenerateAllLinks(nodes)\n\n\tconfig := simulator.GridConfig{\n\t\tMinX:     minX,\n\t\tMinY:     minY,\n\t\tWidth:    maxX - minX,\n\t\tDepth:    maxY - minY,\n\t\tCellSize: 0.2,\n\t}\n\tgdopComp := simulator.NewGDOPComputer(links, config)\n\tresults := gdopComp.ComputeAll()\n\n\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"coverage_percent\": gdopComp.CoverageScore(results),\n\t\t\"minimum_nodes\":    simulator.MinimumNodeCount(space, 4.0),\n\t\t\"current_nodes\":    nodes.Count(),\n\t\t\"average_gdop\":     gdopComp.AverageGDOP(results),\n\t})\n}\n\n// GetGDOPHeatmap returns GDOP data in a format suitable for heatmap visualization\nfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) GetGDOPHeatmap(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tspace := h.space\n\tnodes := h.nodes\n\th.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif nodes.Count() < 2 {\n\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\"gdop_map\":         []float64{},\n\t\t\t\"grid_dimensions\": []int{0, 0, 0},\n\t\t\t\"coverage_percent\": 0,\n\t\t\t\"error\":            \"need at least 2 nodes\",\n\t\t})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, _ := space.Bounds()\n\tlinks := simulator.GenerateAllLinks(nodes)\n\n\tconfig := simulator.GridConfig{\n\t\tMinX:     minX,\n\t\tMinY:     minY,\n\t\tWidth:    maxX - minX,\n\t\tDepth:    maxY - minY,\n\t\tCellSize: 0.2,\n\t}\n\tgdopComp := simulator.NewGDOPComputer(links, config)\n\tresults := gdopComp.ComputeAll()\n\n\t// Convert results to heatmap format\n\tdepth := len(results)\n\twidth := 0\n\tif depth > 0 {\n\t\twidth = len(results[0])\n\t}\n\n\t// Flatten GDOP values into 1D array (row-major order)\n\tgdopMap := make([]float64, width*depth)\n\tfor y := 0; y < depth; y++ {\n\t\tfor x := 0; x < width; x++ {\n\t\t\tidx := y*width + x\n\t\t\tif math.IsInf(results[y][x].GDOP, 0) {\n\t\t\t\tgdopMap[idx] = 9999.0 // Use 9999 to represent infinity\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tgdopMap[idx] = results[y][x].GDOP\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"gdop_map\":         gdopMap,\n\t\t\"grid_dimensions\": []int{width, depth, 1}, // 2D heatmap, so height = 1\n\t\t\"coverage_percent\": gdopComp.CoverageScore(results),\n\t\t\"average_gdop\":     gdopComp.AverageGDOP(results),\n\t\t\"quality_counts\":   gdopComp.QualityCounts(results),\n\t})\n}\n\n// GetShoppingList returns hardware recommendations\nfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) GetShoppingList(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tspace := h.space\n\tnodes := h.nodes\n\th.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tshoppingList := simulator.GenerateShoppingList(space, nodes)\n\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, shoppingList)\n}\n\n// SimulationRequest contains parameters for running a simulation\ntype SimulationRequest struct {\n\tDurationSec int     `json:\"duration_sec\"` // Simulation duration in seconds\n\tRateHz      int     `json:\"rate_hz\"`      // Update rate in Hz\n\tThreshold   float64 `json:\"threshold\"`    // DeltaRMS threshold\n}\n\n// SimulationResponse contains simulation results\ntype SimulationResponse struct {\n\tWalkerPositions []simulator.Point `json:\"walker_positions\"`\n\tLinkActivity    map[string]float64 `json:\"link_activity\"`\n\tDuration        int                `json:\"duration\"`\n\tTicks           int                `json:\"ticks\"`\n}\n\n// RunSimulation runs a time-step simulation with the current configuration\nfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) RunSimulation(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tvar req SimulationRequest\n\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n\t\treq = SimulationRequest{\n\t\t\tDurationSec: 10,\n\t\t\tRateHz:      10,\n\t\t\tThreshold:   0.02,\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tspace := h.space\n\tnodes := h.nodes\n\twalkers := h.walkers\n\th.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif walkers.Count() == 0 {\n\t\trespondError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, \"no walkers in simulation\")\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif nodes.Count() < 2 {\n\t\trespondError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, \"need at least 2 nodes for simulation\")\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Create propagation model\n\tpropModel := simulator.NewPropagationModel(space)\n\n\t// Generate all links\n\tlinks := simulator.GenerateAllLinks(nodes)\n\n\t// Run simulation ticks\n\tdt := 1.0 / float64(req.RateHz)\n\tnumTicks := req.DurationSec * req.RateHz\n\n\t// Collect final positions and link activity\n\tfinalPositions := make([]simulator.Point, 0)\n\tlinkActivity := make(map[string]float64)\n\n\tfor tick := 0; tick < numTicks; tick++ {\n\t\t// Update walker positions\n\t\twalkers.Update(dt, space)\n\n\t\t// Compute link activity\n\t\tfor _, link := range links {\n\t\t\tlinkID := link.TX.ID + \":\" + link.RX.ID\n\t\t\tmaxDelta := 0.0\n\n\t\t\tfor _, walker := range walkers.All() {\n\t\t\t\tdelta := propModel.ComputeLinkActivity(link, walker.Position, req.Threshold)\n\t\t\t\tif delta > maxDelta {\n\t\t\t\t\tmaxDelta = delta\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif maxDelta > linkActivity[linkID] {\n\t\t\t\tlinkActivity[linkID] = maxDelta\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Collect final walker positions\n\tfor _, w := range walkers.All() {\n\t\tfinalPositions = append(finalPositions, w.Position)\n\t}\n\n\tresponse := SimulationResponse{\n\t\tWalkerPositions: finalPositions,\n\t\tLinkActivity:    linkActivity,\n\t\tDuration:        req.DurationSec,\n\t\tTicks:           numTicks,\n\t}\n\n\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, response)\n}\n\n// Helper functions\n\nfunc getBoundsJSON(space *simulator.Space) map[string]float64 {\n\tminX, minY, minZ, maxX, maxY, maxZ := space.Bounds()\n\treturn map[string]float64{\n\t\t\"min_x\": minX,\n\t\t\"min_y\": minY,\n\t\t\"min_z\": minZ,\n\t\t\"max_x\": maxX,\n\t\t\"max_y\": maxY,\n\t\t\"max_z\": maxZ,\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc respondJSON(w http.ResponseWriter, status int, data interface{}) {\n\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")\n\tw.WriteHeader(status)\n\tif err := json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(data); err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[ERROR] Failed to encode JSON response: %v\", err)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc respondError(w http.ResponseWriter, status int, message string) {\n\trespondJSON(w, status, map[string]string{\"error\": message})\n}\n","numLines":688,"startLine":1,"totalLines":688}}}

   };\n35\t\n36\t    // ============================================\n37\t    // State\n38\t    // ============================================\n39\t    const state = {\n40\t        // Space false,\n57\t        simulationTime: 0,\n58\t        simulationResults: null,\n59\t\n60\t        // UI state\n61\t        currentTool: 'select', // select, wall, node, walker\n62\t        editingNode: null,\n63\t\n64\t        // GDOP overlay\n65\t        showGDOP: false,\n66\t        gdopData: null,\n67\t\n68\t        // Session ID\n69\t        sessionId: null,\n70\t    };\n71\t\n72\t    // ============================================\n73\t    // DOM Elements\n74\t    // ============================================\n75\t    let elements = {};\n76\t\n77\t    // ============================================\n78\t    // Three.js references\n79\t    // ============================================\n80\t    let _scene = null;\n81\t    let _camera = null;\n82\t    let _renderer = null;\n83\t    let _controls = null;\n84\t    let _transformControls = null;\n85\t    let _nodeMeshes = new Map();\n86\t    let _walkerMeshes = new Map();\n87\t    let _gdopMesh = null;\n88\t    let _roomBoundsMesh = null;\n89\t    let _linkLineMeshes = [];\n90\t\n91\t    // Node MAC address generator for virtual nodes\n92\t    let _virtualNodeCounter = 0;\n93\t\n94\t    // ============================================\n95\t    // Initialization\n96\t    // ============================================\n97\t    function init() {\n98\t        console.log('[Simulate] Initializing pre-deployment simulator');\n99\t\n100\t        // Wait for Three.js scene to be ready\n101\t        if (window.Viz3D) {\n102\t            initAfterViz3D();\n103\t        } else {\n104\t            document.addEventListener('viz3d-ready', initAfterViz3D);\n105\t        }\n106\t    }\n107\t\n108\t    function initAfterViz3D() {\n109\t        // Get Three.js references from Viz3D\n110\t        const container = document.getElementById('scene-container');\n111\t        if (!container) {\n112\t            console.warn('[Simulate] No scene-container found');\n113\t            return;\n114\t        }\n115\t\n116\t        // Initialize UI elements from existing HTML\n117\t        initSimulatorUI();\n118\t\n119\t        // Initialize TransformControls for 3D editing\n120\t        initTransformControls();\n121\t\n122\t        // Apply default space\n123\t        applySpace();\n124\t\n125\t        console.log('[Simulate] Ready');\n126\t    }\n127\t\n128\t    // ============================================\n129\t    // Simulator UI\n130\t    // ============================================\n131\t    function initSimulatorUI() {\n132\t        // Store element references from existing HTML structure in simulator.html\n133\t        elements = {\n134\t            // Space configuration\n135\t            spaceWidth: document.getElementById('space-width'),\n136\t            spaceDepth: document.getElementById('space-depth'),\n137\t            spaceHeight: document.getElementById('space-height'),\n138\t            applySpace: document.getElementById('btn-apply-space'),\n139\t\n140\t            // Node controls\n141\t            addNode: document.getElementById('btn-add-node'),\n142\t            nodeList: document.getElementById('node-list'),\n143\t            nodeSuggestions: document.getElementById('node-suggestions'),\n144\t\n145\t            // Simulation controls\n146\t            simulateBtn: document.getElementById('btn-simulate'),\n147\t            stopBtn: document.getElementById('btn-stop'),\n148\t            resetBtn: document.getElementById('btn-reset'),\n149\t            duration: document.getElementById('sim-duration'),\n150\t            walkers: document.getElementById('sim-walkers'),\n151\t            showPaths: document.getElementById('sim-show-paths'),\n152\t\n153\t            // Results display\n154\t            metricCoverage: document.getElementById('metric-coverage'),\n155\t            metricGdop: document.getElementById('metric-gdop'),\n156\t            metricBlobs: document.getElementById('metric-blobs'),\n157\t            simStatus: document.getElementById('sim-status'),\n158\t\n159\t            // GDOP canvas\n160\t            gdopCanvas: document.getElementById('gdop-canvas'),\n161\t        };\n162\t\n163\t        // Attach event listeners\n164\t        if (elements.applySpace) {\n165\t            elements.applySpace.addEventListener('click', applySpace);\n166\t        }\n167\t        if (elements.addNode) {\n168\t            elements.addNode.addEventListener('click', addNode);\n169\t        }\n170\t        if (elements.simulateBtn) {\n171\t            elements.simulateBtn.addEventListener('click', startSimulation);\n172\t        }\n173\t        if (elements.stopBtn) {\n174\t            elements.stopBtn.addEventListener('click', stopSimulation);\n175\t        }\n176\t        if (elements.resetBtn) {\n177\t            elements.resetBtn.addEventListener('click', resetSimulation);\n178\t        }\n179\t\n180\t        console.log('[Simulate] Simulator UI initialized');\n181\t    }\n182\t\n183\t    // ============================================\n184\t    // TransformControls (3D Editor Reuse)\n185\t    // ============================================\n186\t    function initTransformControls() {\n187\t        if (!window.Viz3D) return;\n188\t\n189\t        _scene = window.Viz3D.getScene?.();\n190\t        _camera = window.Viz3D.getCamera?.();\n191\t        _renderer = window.Viz3D.getRenderer?.();\n192\t        _controls = window.Viz3D.getControls?.();\n193\t\n194\t        if (!_scene || !_camera || !_renderer) {\n195\t            console.warn('[Simulate] Viz3D not ready yet');\n196\t            return;\n197\t        }\n198\t\n199\t        // Initialize TransformControls for dragging nodes\n200\t        if (typeof THREE !== 'undefined' && THREE.TransformControls) {\n201\t            _transformControls = new THREE.TransformControls(_camera, _renderer.domElement);\n202\t            _transformControls.setMode('translate');\n203\t            _transformControls.setSize(0.75);\n204\t            _scene.add(_transformControls.getHelper());\n205\t\n206\t            // Disable orbit controls while dragging\n207\t            _transformControls.addEventListener('dragging-changed', function (event) {\n208\t                if (_controls) {\n209\t                    _controls.enabled = !event.value;\n210\t                }\n211\t\n212\t                // Save position on drag end\n213\t                if (!event.value && state.editingNode) {\n214\t                    const mesh = _nodeMeshes.get(state.editingNode.id);\n215\t                    if (mesh) {\n216\t                        updateNodePosition(state.editingNode.id, {\n217\t                            x: mesh.position.x,\n218\t                            y: mesh.position.y,\n219\t                            z: mesh.position.z\n220\t                        });\n221\t                        // Update GDOP when node position changes\n222\t                        if (state.showGDOP) {\n223\t                            updateGDOP();\n224\t                        }\n225\t                    }\n226\t                    state.editingNode = null;\n227\t                }\n228\t            });\n229\t\n230\t            // Constrain to room bounds during drag\n231\t            _transformControls.addEventListener('objectChange', function () {\n232\t                if (!state.editingNode || !state.space) return;\n233\t\n234\t                const obj = _transformControls.object;\n235\t                const { width, depth, height } = state.space;\n236\t\n237\t                // Clamp to room bounds\n238\t                obj.position.x = Math.max(0, Math.min(width, obj.position.x));\n239\t                obj.position.y = Math.max(0.1, Math.min(height, obj.position.y));\n240\t                obj.position.z = Math.max(0, Math.min(depth, obj.position.z));\n241\t\n242\t                // Update link lines during drag\n243\t                rebuildLinkLines();\n244\t            });\n245\t        }\n246\t\n247\t        // Add pointer event listener for node selection\n248\t        _renderer.domElement.addEventListener('pointerdown', onPointerDown);\n249\t        _renderer.domElement.addEventListener('pointerup', onPointerUp);\n250\t\n251\t        console.log('[Simulate] TransformControls initialized');\n252\t    }\n253\t\n254\t    // Pointer event handlers for click-to-select\n255\t    let _mouseDown = { x: 0, y: 0 };\n256\t    const CLICK_THRESHOLD = 5;\n257\t\n258\t    function onPointerDown(event) {\n259\t        _mouseDown.x = event.clientX;\n260\t        _mouseDown.y = event.clientY;\n261\t    }\n262\t\n263\t    function onPointerUp(event) {\n264\t        const dx = event.clientX - _mouseDown.x;\n265\t        const dy = event.clientY - _mouseDown.y;\n266\t        if (Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy) > CLICK_THRESHOLD) return;\n267\t        if (event.target !== _renderer?.domElement) return;\n268\t\n269\t        const rect = _renderer.domElement.getBoundingClientRect();\n270\t        const mouse = new THREE.Vector2(\n271\t            ((event.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width) * 2 - 1,\n272\t            -((event.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height) * 2 + 1\n273\t        );\n274\t\n275\t        const raycaster = new THREE.Raycaster();\n276\t        raycaster.setFromCamera(mouse, _camera);\n277\t\n278\t        // Collect all node meshes\n279\t        const meshes = Array.from(_nodeMeshes.values());\n280\t        const intersects = raycaster.intersectObjects(meshes);\n281\t\n282\t        if (intersects.length > 0) {\n283\t            // Find which node owns this mesh\n284\t            for (const [nodeId, mesh] of _nodeMeshes.entries()) {\n285\t                if (mesh === intersects[0].object || mesh === intersects[0].object.parent) {\n286\t                    selectNode(nodeId);\n287\t                    return;\n288\t                }\n289\t            }\n290\t        }\n291\t\n292\t        deselectNode();\n293\t    }\n294\t\n295\t    // ============================================\n296\t    // Node Selection (3D Editor)\n297\t    // ============================================\n298\t    function selectNode(nodeId) {\n299\t        if (state.editingNode?.id === nodeId) return;\n300\t\n301\t        deselectNode();\n302\t\n303\t        const node = state.nodes.find(n => n.id === nodeId);\n304\t        if (!node) return;\n305\t\n306\t        state.editingNode = node;\n307\t\n308\t        const mesh = _nodeMeshes.get(nodeId);\n309\t        if (mesh && _transformControls) {\n310\t            _transformControls.attach(mesh);\n311\t        }\n312\t\n313\t        // Update UI\n314\t        renderNodes();\n315\t\n316\t        console.log('[Simulate] Node selected:', nodeId);\n317\t    }\n318\t\n319\t    function deselectNode() {\n320\t        if (_transformControls) {\n321\t            _transformControls.detach();\n322\t        }\n323\t        state.editingNode = null;\n324\t\n325\t        // Update UI\n326\t        renderNodes();\n327\t    }\n328\t\n329\t    // ============================================\n330\t    // Space Management\n331\t    // ============================================\n332\t    function applySpace() {\n333\t        const width = elements.spaceWidth ? parseFloat(elements.spaceWidth.value) : 10;\n334\t        const depth = elements.spaceDepth ? parseFloat(elements.spaceDepth.value) : 8;\n335\t        const height = elements.spaceHeight ? parseFloat(elements.spaceHeight.value) : 2.5;\n336\t\n337\t        state.space = { width, depth, height, walls: [] };\n338\t\n339\t        // Update 3D visualization with Viz3D\n340\t        if (window.Viz3D && window.Viz3D.applyRoom) {\n341\t            window.Viz3D.applyRoom({\n342\t                width: width,\n343\t                depth: depth,\n344\t                height: height,\n345\t                origin_x: 0,\n346\t                origin_z: 0,\n347\t            });\n348\t        }\n349\t\n350\t        // Update room bounds wireframe visualization\n351\t        updateRoomBoundsVisualization();\n352\t\n353\t        console.log('[Simulate] Space applied:', state.space);\n354\t    }\n355\t\n356\t    // ============================================\n357\t    // Room Bounds Visualization\n358\t    // ============================================\n359\t    function updateRoomBoundsVisualization() {\n360\t        const scene = window.Viz3D?.getScene?.();\n361\t        if (!scene || !state.space) return;\n362\t\n363\t        // Remove existing room bounds mesh\n364\t        if (_roomBoundsMesh) {\n365\t            scene.remove(_roomBoundsMesh);\n366\t            _roomBoundsMesh.geometry.dispose();\n367\t            _roomBoundsMesh.material.dispose();\n368\t            _roomBoundsMesh = null;\n369\t        }\n370\t\n371\t        const { width, depth, height } = state.space;\n372\t\n373\t        // Create wireframe box geometry\n374\t        const geometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(width, height, depth);\n375\t        const edges = new THREE.EdgesGeometry(geometry);\n376\t\n377\t        const material = new THREE.LineBasicMaterial({\n378\t            color: 0x4fc3f7,\n379\t            opacity: 0.4,\n380\t            transparent: true,\n381\t        });\n382\t\n383\t        _roomBoundsMesh = new THREE.LineSegments(edges, material);\n384\t        _roomBoundsMesh.position.set(width / 2, height / 2, depth / 2);\n385\t\n386\t        scene.add(_roomBoundsMesh);\n387\t\n388\t        console.log('[Simulate] Room bounds visualization updated:', { width, depth, height });\n389\t    }\n390\t\n391\t    // ============================================\n392\t    // Node Management\n393\t    // ============================================\n394\t    function addNode() {\n395\t        // Generate virtual MAC address\n396\t        _virtualNodeCounter++;\n397\t        const mac = 'AA:BB:CC:' +\n398\t            (_virtualNodeCounter & 0xFF).toString(16).padStart(2, '0').toUpperCase() + ':' +\n399\t            ((_virtualNodeCounter >> 8) & 0xFF).toString(16).padStart(2, '0').toUpperCase() + ':' +\n400\t            ((_virtualNodeCounter >> 16) & 0xFF).toString(16).padStart(2, '0').toUpperCase();\n401\t\n402\t        const id = 'node_' + Date.now() + '_' + _virtualNodeCounter;\n403\t        const node = {\n404\t            id: id,\n405\t            mac: mac,\n406\t            name: 'Virtual Node ' + (state.nodes.length + 1),\n407\t            type: 'virtual',\n408\t            node_type: 'esp32',\n409\t            virtual: true,\n410\t            position: {\n411\t                x: state.space.width / 2,\n412\t                y: 1.0,\n413\t                z: state.space.depth / 2,\n414\t            },\n415\t            role: 'tx_rx',\n416\t            enabled: true,\n417\t        };\n418\t\n419\t        state.nodes.push(node);\n420\t        renderNodes();\n421\t        updateNodeVisualization(node);\n422\t        rebuildLinkLines();\n423\t\n424\t        // Update status\n425\t        updateStatus(`Added ${node.name} at (${node.position.x.toFixed(1)}, ${node.position.y.toFixed(1)}, ${node.position.z.toFixed(1)})`);\n426\t\n427\t        // Auto-show GDOP if this is the second node\n428\t        if (state.nodes.length >= 2 && !state.showGDOP) {\n429\t            toggleGDOP();\n430\t        }\n431\t\n432\t        console.log('[Simulate] Node added:', node);\n433\t    }\n434\t\n435\t    function removeNode(nodeId) {\n436\t        const node = state.nodes.find(n => n.id === nodeId);\n437\t        state.nodes = state.nodes.filter(n => n.id !== nodeId);\n438\t        renderNodes();\n439\t        removeNodeVisualization(nodeId);\n440\t\n441\t        updateStatus(`Removed ${node ? node.name : 'node'}`);\n442\t        console.log('[Simulate] Node removed:', nodeId);\n443\t    }\n444\t\n445\t    function updateNodePosition(nodeId, position) {\n446\t        const node = state.nodes.find(n => n.id === nodeId);\n447\t        if (node) {\n448\t            node.position = position;\n449\t            updateNodeVisualization(node);\n450\t        }\n451\t    }\n452\t\n453\t    function renderNodes() {\n454\t        if (!elements.nodeList) return;\n455\t\n456\t        elements.nodeList.innerHTML = '';\n457\t        state.nodes.forEach(node => {\n458\t            const div = document.createElement('div');\n459\t            div.className = 'sim-item' + (state.editingNode?.id === node.id ? ' selected' : '');\n460\t            div.style.cssText = 'display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:8px;background:var(--bg-hover);border-radius:4px;margin-bottom:4px;cursor:pointer;';\n461\t            div.innerHTML = `\n462\t                <span style=\"font-size:var(--text-sm);\">${node.name}</span>\n463\t                <span style=\"font-size:var(--text-2xs);color:var(--text-muted);\">\n464\t                    (${node.position.x.toFixed(1)}, ${node.position.y.toFixed(1)}, ${node.position.z.toFixed(1)})\n465\t                </span>\n466\t                <button class=\"sim-item-delete\" data-id=\"${node.id}\" style=\"background:none;border:none;color:var(--alert);cursor:pointer;padding:4px 8px;\">&times;</button>\n467\t            `;\n468\t            elements.nodeList.appendChild(div);\n469\t\n470\t            // Add click handler for selection\n471\t            div.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n472\t                if (!e.target.classList.contains('sim-item-delete')) {\n473\t                    selectNode(node.id);\n474\t                }\n475\t            });\n476\t        });\n477\t\n478\t        // Attach delete handlers\n479\t        elements.nodeList.querySelectorAll('.sim-item-delete').forEach(btn => {\n480\t            btn.addEventListener('click', () => removeNode(btn.dataset.id));\n481\t        });\n482\t    }\n483\t\n484\t    function updateStatus(message) {\n485\t        if (elements.simStatus) {\n486\t            elements.simStatus.textContent = message;\n487\t        }\n488\t    }\n489\t\n490\t    // ============================================\n491\t    // GDOP Visualization\n492\t    // ============================================\n493\t    function toggleGDOP() {\n494\t        state.showGDOP = !state.showGDOP;\n495\t        if (state.showGDOP) {\n496\t            updateGDOP();\n497\t        } else {\n498\t            clearGDOPMesh();\n499\t        }\n500\t    }\n501\t\n502\t    async function updateGDOP() {\n503\t        if (state.nodes.length < 2) {\n504\t            console.warn('[Simulate] Need at least 2 nodes for GDOP');\n505\t            return;\n506\t        }\n507\t\n508\t        try {\n509\t            const response = await fetch('/api/simulator/gdop/heatmap', {\n510\t                method: 'GET',\n511\t                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n512\t            });\n513\t\n514\t            if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to compute GDOP');\n515\t\n516\t            const data = await response.json();\n517\t            state.gdopData = data;\n518\t            renderGDOP(data);\n519\t\n520\t            console.log('[Simulate] GDOP updated:', data);\n521\t        } catch (err) {\n522\t            console.error('[Simulate] Failed to update GDOP:', err);\n523\t        }\n524\t    }\n525\t\n526\t    function renderGDOP(data) {\n527\t        clearGDOPMesh();\n528\t\n529\t        if (!data.gdop_map || !data.grid_dimensions) {\n530\t            console.warn('[Simulate] Invalid GDOP data');\n531\t            return;\n532\t        }\n533\t\n534\t        // Create texture from GDOP data\n535\t        const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n536\t        const size = 256;\n537\t        canvas.width = size;\n538\t        canvas.height = size;\n539\t        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n540\t\n541\t        const imageData = ctx.createImageData(size, size);\n542\t\n543\t        // Grid dimensions from backend: [width_cells, depth_cells]\n544\t        const gridWidth = data.grid_dimensions[0];\n545\t        const gridDepth = data.grid_dimensions[1];\n546\t\n547\t        // gdop_map is a 1D flattened array: [x + y * width]\n548\t        // We render the 2D floor plane\n549\t\n550\t        for (let y = 0; y < size; y++) {\n551\t            for (let x = 0; x < size; x++) {\n552\t                // Map pixel to grid cell\n553\t                const gridX = Math.floor((x / size) * gridWidth);\n554\t                const gridY = Math.floor((y / size) * gridDepth);\n555\t\n556\t                // Calculate index in flattened array\n557\t                const idx = gridY * gridWidth + gridX;\n558\t\n559\t                // Get GDOP value (9999 = infinity)\n560\t                const gdop = data.gdop_map[idx] !== undefined ? data.gdop_map[idx] : 9999;\n561\t\n562\t                // Color based on GDOP quality (matching Go GDOPColorMap)\n563\t                let color;\n564\t                if (gdop >= 9999) {\n565\t                    color = { r: 80, g: 80, b: 80 }; // None - gray\n566\t                } else if (gdop < 2.0) {\n567\t                    color = { r: 34, g: 197, b: 94 }; // Excellent - green\n568\t                } else if (gdop < 4.0) {\n569\t                    color = { r: 255, g: 193, b: 7 }; // Good - yellow\n570\t                } else if (gdop < 8.0) {\n571\t                    color = { r: 255, g: 146, b: 0 }; // Fair - orange\n572\t                } else {\n573\t                    color = { r: 220, g: 53, b: 69 }; // Poor - red\n574\t                }\n575\t\n576\t                const i = (y * size + x) * 4;\n577\t                imageData.data[i] = color.r;\n578\t                imageData.data[i + 1] = color.g;\n579\t                imageData.data[i + 2] = color.b;\n580\t                imageData.data[i + 3] = 180; // Alpha\n581\t            }\n582\t        }\n583\t\n584\t        ctx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);\n585\t\n586\t        const texture = new THREE.CanvasTexture(canvas);\n587\t        texture.needsUpdate = true;\n588\t        const material = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({\n589\t            map: texture,\n590\t            transparent: true,\n591\t            opacity: 0.7,\n592\t            side: THREE.DoubleSide,\n593\t            depthWrite: false,\n594\t        });\n595\t\n596\t        const geometry = new THREE.PlaneGeometry(state.space.width, state.space.depth);\n597\t        _gdopMesh = new THREE.Mesh(geometry, material);\n598\t        _gdopMesh.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2;\n599\t        _gdopMesh.position.set(state.space.width / 2, 0.01, state.space.depth / 2);\n600\t\n601\t        // Get scene from Viz3D\n602\t        if (window.Viz3D) {\n603\t            const scene = window.Viz3D.getScene?.();\n604\t            if (scene) scene.add(_gdopMesh);\n605\t        }\n606\t\n607\t        // Update metrics\n608\t        if (data.coverage_score !== undefined && elements.metricCoverage) {\n609\t            const coveragePercent = (data.coverage_score * 100).toFixed(1);\n610\t            elements.metricCoverage.textContent = coveragePercent + '%';\n611\t        }\n612\t\n613\t        if (data.mean_gdop !== undefined && elements.metricGdop) {\n614\t            const meanGDOP = data.mean_gdop < 9999 ? data.mean_gdop.toFixed(2) : '∞';\n615\t            elements.metricGdop.textContent = meanGDOP;\n616\t        }\n617\t\n618\t        console.log('[Simulate] GDOP rendered');\n619\t    }\n620\t\n621\t    function clearGDOPMesh() {\n622\t        if (_gdopMesh) {\n623\t            const scene = window.Viz3D?.getScene?.();\n624\t            if (scene) scene.remove(_gdopMesh);\n625\t            _gdopMesh.geometry.dispose();\n626\t            _gdopMesh.material.dispose();\n627\t            _gdopMesh = null;\n628\t        }\n629\t    }\n630\t\n631\t    // ============================================\n632\t    // Simulation Control\n633\t    // ============================================\n634\t    async function startSimulation() {\n635\t        if (state.nodes.length < 2) {\n636\t            updateStatus('Error: Add at least 2 nodes first');\n637\t            return;\n638\t        }\n639\t\n640\t        updateStatus('Starting simulation...');\n641\t\n642\t        try {\n643\t            const response = await fetch('/api/simulator/simulate', {\n644\t                method: 'POST',\n645\t                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n646\t                body: JSON.stringify({\n647\t                    duration_sec: CONFIG.defaultDurationSec,\n648\t                    tick_rate_hz: CONFIG.tickRateHz,\n649\t                }),\n650\t            });\n651\t\n652\t            if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to start simulation');\n653\t\n654\t            const data = await response.json();\n655\t            state.simulationRunning = true;\n656\t            state.simulationPaused = false;\n657\t            state.simulationTime = 0;\n658\t\n659\t            // Update UI\n660\t            if (elements.simulateBtn) elements.simulateBtn.disabled = true;\n661\t            if (elements.stopBtn) elements.stopBtn.disabled = false;\n662\t\n663\t            // Start progress update\n664\t            startProgressLoop();\n665\t\n666\t            // Poll for results\n667\t            pollSimulationResults();\n668\t\n669\t            console.log('[Simulate] Simulation started');\n670\t        } catch (err) {\n671\t            console.error('[Simulate] Failed to start simulation:', err);\n672\t            updateStatus('Error: ' + err.message);\n673\t        }\n674\t    }\n675\t\n676\t    function stopSimulation() {\n677\t        state.simulationRunning = false;\n678\t        state.simulationPaused = false;\n679\t        state.simulationTime = 0;\n680\t\n681\t        // Update UI\n682\t        if (elements.simulateBtn) function updateNodeVisualization(node) {\n962\t        // Get scene from Viz3D\n963\t        const scene = window.Viz3D?.getScene?.();\n964\t        if (!scene) return;\n965\t\n966\t        // Remove ];\n1044\t                const geometry = new THREE.BufferGeometry().setFromPoints(points);\n1045\t\n1046\t                let material;\n1047\t                if (isVirtualLink) {\n1048\t
