`json:\"velocity\"`\n26\t\tType       WalkerType `json:\"type\"`\n27\t\tPath       []Point    `json:\"path,omitempty\"`      // For path-following mode\n28\t\tPathIndex  int          // Person height in meters\n31\t\tBLEAddress string     `json:\"ble_address,omitempty\"` // Simulated BLE device\n32\t\t// Node-to-node traversal fields\n33\t\tNodes      []*Node    `json:\"nodes,omitempty\"`      // List of nodes to visit\n34\t\tNodeIndex  int        `json:\"node_index,omitempty\"` // Current target node index\n35\t\tWaitTimer  float64    `json:\"wait_timer,omitempty\"` // Time remaining at current node\n36\t\tWaitTime   float64    `json:\"wait_time,omitempty\"`  // How long to wait at each node (seconds)\n37\t\tShouldWait bool       `json:\"should_wait,omitempty\"` // Whether to wait at nodes\n38\t}\n39\t\n40\t// NewWalker creates a new walker at the given position\n41\tfunc NewWalker(id string, position Point) *Walker {\n42\t\treturn &Walker{\n43\t\t\tID:       id,\n44\t\t\tPosition: position,\n45\t\t\tType:     WalkerTypeRandomWalk,\n46\t\t\tSpeed:    1.0,  // 1 m/s default\n47\t\t\tHeight:   1.7,  // Average person height\n48\t\t\tVelocity: Point{X: 0, Y: 0, Z: 0},\n49\t\t}\n50\t}\n51\t\n52\t// NewRandomWalker creates a walker with random motion\n53\tfunc NewRandomWalker(id string, position Point, speed float64) *Walker {\n54\t\tw := NewWalker(id, position)\n55\t\tw.Type = WalkerTypeRandomWalk\n56\t\tw.Speed = speed\n57\t\t// Initial random velocity\n58\t\tangle := rand.Float64() * 2 * math.Pi\n59\t\tw.Velocity = Point{\n60\t\t\tX: math.Cos(angle) * speed * 0.5,\n61\t\t\tY: math.Sin(angle) * speed * 0.5,\n62\t\t\tZ: 0,\n63\t\t}\n64\t\treturn w\n65\t}\n66\t\n67\t// NewPathWalker creates a walker that follows a predefined path\n68\tfunc NewPathWalker(id string, path []Point, speed float64) *Walker {\n69\t\tif len(path) == 0 {\n70\t\t\tpanic(\"path cannot be empty\")\n71\t\t}\n72\t\tw := NewWalker(id, path[0])\n73\t\tw.Type = WalkerTypePathFollow\n74\t\tw.Path = path\n75\t\tw.PathIndex = 0\n76\t\tw.Speed = speed\n77\t\treturn w\n78\t}\n79\t\n80\t// NewNodeToNodeWalker creates a walker that traverses between virtual nodes\n81\tfunc NewNodeToNodeWalker(id string, nodes []*Node, speed float64, waitTime float64) *Walker {\n82\t\tif len(nodes) == 0 {\n83\t\t\tpanic(\"nodes cannot be empty\")\n84\t\t}\n85\t\tif len(nodes) == 1 {\n86\t\t\tpanic(\"need at least 2 nodes for node-to-node traversal\")\n87\t\t}\n88\t\n89\t\t// Start at the first node\n90\t\tw := NewWalker(id, nodes[0].Position)\n91\t\tw.Type = WalkerTypeNodeToNode\n92\t\tw.Nodes = nodes\n93\t\tw.NodeIndex = 1 // Target is the second node\n94\t\tw.Speed = speed\n95\t\tw.WaitTime = waitTime\n96\t\tw.WaitTimer = waitTime\n97\t\tw.ShouldWait = waitTime > 0\n98\t\n99\t\treturn w\n100\t}\n101\t\n102\t// NewNodeToNodeWalkerNoWait creates a walker that traverses between nodes without waiting\n103\tfunc NewNodeToNodeWalkerNoWait(id string, nodes []*Node, speed float64) *Walker {\n104\t\treturn NewNodeToNodeWalker(id, nodes, speed, 0)\n105\t}\n106\t\n107\t// Update updates the walker's position based on their movement type\n108\t// dt is the time step in seconds\n109\tfunc (w *Walker) Update(dt float64, space *Space) {\n110\t\tswitch w.Type {\n111\t\tcase WalkerTypeRandomWalk:\n112\t\t\tw.updateRandomWalk(dt, space)\n113\t\tcase WalkerTypePathFollow:\n114\t\t\tw.updatePathFollow(dt)\n115\t\tcase WalkerTypeNodeToNode:\n116\t\t\tw.updateNodeToNode(dt, space)\n117\t\t}\n118\t}\n119\t\n120\t// updateRandomWalk implements random walk motion\n121\tfunc (w *Walker) updateRandomWalk(dt float64, space *Space) {\n122\t\t// Update position\n123\t\tw.Position.X += w.Velocity.X * dt\n124\t\tw.Position.Y += w.Velocity.Y * dt\n125\t\n126\t\t// Get space bounds for collision\n127\t\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, _ := space.Bounds()\n128\t\n129\t\t// Bounce off walls (with some margin)\n130\t\tmargin := 0.2 // 20cm margin\n131\t\tif w.Position.X < minX+margin {\n132\t\t\tw.Position.X = minX + margin\n133\t\t\tw.Velocity.X *= -1\n134\t\t}\n135\t\tif w.Position.X > maxX-margin {\n136\t\t\tw.Position.X = maxX - margin\n137\t\t\tw.Velocity.X *= -1\n138\t\t}\n139\t\tif w.Position.Y < minY+margin {\n140\t\t\tw.Position.Y = minY + margin\n141\t\t\tw.Velocity.Y *= -1\n142\t\t}\n143\t\tif w.Position.Y > maxY-margin {\n144\t\t\tw.Position.Y = maxY - margin\n145\t\t\tw.Velocity.Y *= -1\n146\t\t}\n147\t\n148\t\t// Random velocity perturbation (simulates human motion)\n149\t\t// Change direction gradually, not abruptly\n150\t\tperturbation := 0.1 // rad/s\n151\t\tangle := math.Atan2(w.Velocity.Y, w.Velocity.X)\n152\t\tangle += (rand.Float64() - 0.5) * perturbation * dt\n153\t\n154\t\t// Clamp velocity magnitude\n155\t\tcurrentSpeed := math.Sqrt(w.Velocity.X*w.Velocity.X + w.Velocity.Y*w.Velocity.Y)\n156\t\ttargetSpeed := w.Speed * (0.5 + rand.Float64()*0.5) // 50%-100% of set speed\n157\t\tnewSpeed := currentSpeed + (targetSpeed-currentSpeed)*0.1 // Smooth speed change\n158\t\n159\t\tmaxSpeed := w.Speed * 1.5\n160\t\tif newSpeed > maxSpeed {\n161\t\t\tnewSpeed = maxSpeed\n162\t\t}\n163\t\n164\t\tw.Velocity.X = math.Cos(angle) * newSpeed\n165\t\tw.Velocity.Y = math.Sin(angle) * newSpeed\n166\t\n167\t\t// Keep Z at person height (standing)\n168\t\tw.Position.Z = w.Height\n169\t}\n170\t\n171\t// updatePathFollow implements path-following motion\n172\tfunc (w *Walker) updatePathFollow(dt float64) {\n173\t\tif len(w.Path) == 0 {\n174\t\t\treturn\n175\t\t}\n176\t\n177\t\t// Get current target point\n178\t\ttarget := w.Path[w.PathIndex]\n179\t\n180\t\t// Vector to target\n181\t\tdx := target.X - w.Position.X\n182\t\tdy := target.Y - w.Position.Y\n183\t\tdz := target.Z - w.Position.Z\n184\t\tdist := math.Sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy + dz*dz)\n185\t\n186\t\t// If very close to target, move to next point\n187\t\tif dist < 0.1 {\n188\t\t\tw.PathIndex = (w.PathIndex + 1) % len(w.Path)\n189\t\t\treturn\n190\t\t}\n191\t\n192\t\t// Move towards target at constant speed\n193\t\tmoveDist := w.Speed * dt\n194\t\tif moveDist > dist {\n195\t\t\tmoveDist = dist\n196\t\t}\n197\t\n198\t\tt := moveDist / dist\n199\t\tw.Position.X += dx * t\n200\t\tw.Position.Y += dy * t\n201\t\n202\t\t// Update velocity vector for consistency\n203\t\tw.Velocity.X = (dx / dist) * w.Speed\n204\t\tw.Velocity.Y = (dy / dist) * w.Speed\n205\t\tw.Velocity.Z = (dz / dist) * w.Speed\n206\t}\n207\t\n208\t// updateNodeToNode implements traversal between virtual nodes\n209\tfunc (w *Walker) updateNodeToNode(dt float64, space *Space) {\n210\t\t// If no nodes configured, fall back to random walk\n211\t\tif len(w.Nodes) == 0 {\n212\t\t\tw.updateRandomWalk(dt, space)\n213\t\t\treturn\n214\t\t}\n215\t\n216\t\t// Get current target node\n217\t\ttargetNode := w.Nodes[w.NodeIndex]\n218\t\ttargetPos := targetNode.Position\n219\t\n220\t\t// Vector to target\n221\t\tdx := targetPos.X - w.Position.X\n222\t\tdy := targetPos.Y - w.Position.Y\n223\t\tdz := targetPos.Z - w.Position.Z\n224\t\tdist := math.Sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy + dz*dz)\n225\t\n226\t\t// Horizontal distance (X/Y only) for arrival detection\n227\t\t// Walkers maintain constant height, so we check horizontal proximity\n228\t\thorizontalDist := math.Sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy)\n229\t\n230\t\t// Check if we've arrived at the target node\n231\t\tif horizontalDist < 0.3 { // Within 30cm horizontally of node\n232\t\t\t// Wait at node if configured\n233\t\t\tif w.ShouldWait {\n234\t\t\t\tif w.WaitTimer > 0 {\n235\t\t\t\t\t// Still waiting\n236\t\t\t\t\tw.WaitTimer -= dt\n237\t\t\t\t\t// Set velocity to zero while waiting\n238\t\t\t\t\tw.Velocity = Point{X: 0, Y: 0, Z: 0}\n239\t\t\t\t\treturn\n240\t\t\t\t}\n241\t\t\t\t// Done waiting, reset timer for next node\n242\t\t\t\tw.WaitTimer = w.WaitTime\n243\t\t\t}\n244\t\n245\t\t\t// Move to next node\n246\t\t\tw.NodeIndex = (w.NodeIndex + 1) % len(w.Nodes)\n247\t\t\treturn\n248\t\t}\n249\t\n250\t\t// Move towards target node\n251\t\t// Calculate speed variation for realism (0.8x to 1.2x base speed)\n252\t\tspeedVariation := 0.8 + 0.4*rand.Float64()\n253\t\tcurrentSpeed := w.Speed * speedVariation\n254\t\n255\t\t// Accelerate/decelerate naturally when starting/stopping\n256\t\tmaxSpeed := currentSpeed\n257\t\tif horizontalDist < 1.0 {\n258\t\t\t// Slow down when approaching target\n259\t\t\tmaxSpeed = currentSpeed * (horizontalDist / 1.0)\n260\t\t\tif maxSpeed < 0.1 {\n261\t\t\t\tmaxSpeed = 0.1\n262\t\t\t}\n263\t\t}\n264\t\n265\t\tmoveDist := maxSpeed * dt\n266\t\tif moveDist > horizontalDist {\n267\t\t\tmoveDist = horizontalDist\n268\t\t}\n269\t\n270\t\tt := moveDist / horizontalDist\n271\t\tw.Position.X += dx * t\n272\t\tw.Position.Y += dy * t\n273\t\n274\t\t// Update velocity vector for consistency\n275\t\tw.Velocity.X = (dx / horizontalDist) * maxSpeed\n276\t\tw.Velocity.Y = (dy / horizontalDist) * maxSpeed\n277\t\tw.Velocity.Z = (dz / dist) * maxSpeed\n278\t\n279\t\t// Keep walker at standing height\n280\t\tw.Position.Z = w.Height\n281\t}\n282\t\n283\t// WalkerSet is a collection of walkers\n284\ttype WalkerSet struct {\n285\t\twalkers []*Walker\n286\t}\n287\t\n288\t// NewWalkerSet creates an empty walker set\n289\tfunc NewWalkerSet() *WalkerSet {\n290\t\treturn &WalkerSet{walkers: make([]*Walker, 0)}\n291\t}\n292\t\n293\t// Add adds a walker\n294\tfunc (ws *WalkerSet) Add(w *Walker) {\n295\t\tws.walkers = append(ws.walkers, w)\n296\t}\n297\t\n298\t// AddRandomWalker adds a random walker at the given position\n299\tfunc (ws *WalkerSet) AddRandomWalker(id string, position Point, speed float64) {\n300\t\tws.Add(NewRandomWalker(id, position, speed))\n301\t}\n302\t\n303\t// AddPathWalker adds a path-following walker\n304\tfunc (ws *WalkerSet) AddPathWalker(id string, path []Point, speed float64) {\n305\t\tws.Add(NewPathWalker(id, path, speed))\n306\t}\n307\t\n308\t// AddNodeToNodeWalker adds a node-to-node traversal walker\n309\tfunc (ws *WalkerSet) AddNodeToNodeWalker(id string, nodes []*Node, speed float64, waitTime float64) {\n310\t\tws.Add(NewNodeToNodeWalker(id, nodes, speed, waitTime))\n311\t}\n312\t\n313\t// AddNodeToNodeWalkerNoWait adds a node-to-node walker that doesn't wait at nodes\n314\tfunc (ws *WalkerSet) AddNodeToNodeWalkerNoWait(id string, nodes []*Node, speed float64) {\n315\t\tws.Add(NewNodeToNodeWalkerNoWait(id, nodes, speed))\n316\t}\n317\t\n318\t// Count returns the number of walkers\n319\tfunc (ws *WalkerSet) Count() int {\n320\t\treturn len(ws.walkers)\n321\t}\n322\t\n323\t// All returns all walkers\n324\tfunc (ws *WalkerSet) All() []*Walker {\n325\t\treturn ws.walkers\n326\t}\n327\t\n328\t// GetByID returns a walker by ID\n329\tfunc (ws *WalkerSet) GetByID(id string) *Walker {\n330\t\tfor _, w := range ws.walkers {\n331\t\t\tif w.ID == id {\n332\t\t\t\treturn w\n333\t\t\t}\n334\t\t}\n335\t\treturn nil\n336\t}\n337\t\n338\t// Remove removes a walker by ID\n339\tfunc (ws *WalkerSet) Remove(id string) bool {\n340\t\tfor i, w := range ws.walkers {\n341\t\t\tif w.ID == id {\n342\t\t\t\tws.walkers = append(ws.walkers[:i], ws.walkers[i+1:]...)\n343\t\t\t\treturn true\n344\t\t\t}\n345\t\t}\n346\t\treturn false\n347\t}\n348\t\n349\t// Clear removes all walkers\n350\tfunc (ws *WalkerSet) Clear() {\n351\t\tws.walkers = make([]*Walker, 0)\n352\t}\n353\t\n354\t// Update updates all walkers\n355\tfunc (ws *WalkerSet) Update(dt float64, space *Space) {\n356\t\tfor _, w := range ws.walkers {\n357\t\t\tw.Update(dt, space)\n358\t\t}\n359\t}\n360\t\n361\t// {\n365\t\t\tpositions[i] = w.Position\n366\t\t}\n367\t\treturn positions\n368\t}\n369\t\n370\t// MarshalJSON implements custom JSON marshaling\n371\tfunc (ws *WalkerSet) MarshalJSON() ([]byte, error) {\n372\t\treturn json.Marshal(ws.walkers)\n373\t}\n374\t\n375\t// UnmarshalJSON implements custom JSON unmarshaling\n376\tfunc (ws *WalkerSet) UnmarshalJSON(data []byte) error {\n377\t\treturn json.Unmarshal(data, &ws.walkers)\n378\t}\n379\t\n380\t// CreateRandomWalkers creates random walkers distributed in the space\n381\tfunc CreateRandomWalkers(count int, space *Space) *WalkerSet {\n382\t\tws := NewWalkerSet()\n383\t\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, _ := space.Bounds()\n384\t\n385\t\tfor i := 0; i < count; i++ {\n386\t\t\tposition := Point{\n387\t\t\t\tX: minX + rand.Float64()*(maxX-minX),\n388\t\t\t\tY: minY + rand.Float64()*(maxY-minY),\n389\t\t\t\tZ: 1.7, // Average person height\n390\t\t\t}\n391\t\t\tws.AddRandomWalker(\n392\t\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"walker-%d\", i),\n393\t\t\t\tposition,\n394\t\t\t\t0.8+rand.Float64()*0.4, // 0.8-1.2 m/s\n395\t\t\t)\n396\t\t}\n397\t\n398\t\treturn ws\n399\t}\n400\t\n401\t// CreatePathWalkers creates walkers that follow rectangular paths around the space perimeter\n402\tfunc CreatePathWalkers(count int, space *Space) *WalkerSet {\n403\t\tws := NewWalkerSet()\n404\t\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, _ := space.Bounds()\n405\t\n406\t\t// Create a rectangular path around the perimeter\n407\t\tpath := []Point{\n408\t\t\t{X: minX + 0.5, Y: minY + 0.5, Z: 1.7},\n409\t\t\t{X: maxX - 0.5, Y: minY + 0.5, Z: 1.7},\n410\t\t\t{X: maxX - 0.5, Y: maxY - 0.5, Z: 1.7},\n411\t\t\t{X: minX + 0.5, Y: maxY - 0.5, Z: 1.7},\n412\t\t}\n413\t\n414\t\tfor i := 0; i < count; i++ {\n415\t\t\t// Offset each walker to start at different positions on the path\n416\t\t\toffset := (float64(i) / float64(count)) * float64(len(path))\n417\t\t\tstartIdx := int(offset) % len(path)\n418\t\n419\t\t\twalker := NewPathWalker(\n420\t\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"walker-%d\", i),\n421\t\t\t\tpath,\n422\t\t\t\t0.8+rand.Float64()*0.4,\n423\t\t\t)\n424\t\t\twalker.PathIndex = startIdx\n425\t\t\twalker.Position = path[startIdx]\n426\t\t\tws.Add(walker)\n427\t\t}\n428\t\n429\t\treturn ws\n430\t}\n431\t\n432\t// CreateNodeToNodeWalkers creates walkers that traverse between virtual nodes\n433\t// The walkers move from node to node, optionally waiting at each node\n434\tfunc CreateNodeToNodeWalkers(count int, nodes *NodeSet, speed float64, waitTime float64) *WalkerSet {\n435\t\tws := NewWalkerSet()\n436\t\n437\t\tallNodes := nodes.All()\n438\t\tif len(allNodes) < 2 {\n439\t\t\t// Not enough nodes, return empty set\n440\t\t\treturn ws\n441\t\t}\n442\t\n443\t\tfor i := 0; i < count; i++ {\n444\t\t\t// Each walker gets the same set of nodes but starts at a different target\n445\t\t\t// Create a copy of nodes for this walker\n446\t\t\tnodeList := make([]*Node, len(allNodes))\n447\t\t\tcopy(nodeList, allNodes)\n448\t\n449\t\t\t// Shuffle the node order for variety (except first, keep it consistent)\n450\t\t\tif i > 0 && len(nodeList) > 2 {\n451\t\t\t\t// Simple rotation for variety\n452\t\t\t\toffset := i % (len(nodeList) - 1)\n453\t\t\t\tfor j := 0; j < offset; j++ {\n454\t\t\t\t\t// Rotate nodes[1:] by one position\n455\t\t\t\t\tfirst := nodeList[1]\n456\t\t\t\t\tcopy(nodeList[1:], nodeList[2:])\n457\t\t\t\t\tnodeList[len(nodeList)-1] = first\n458\t\t\t\t}\n459\t\t\t}\n460\t\n461\t\t\twalker := NewNodeToNodeWalker(\n462\t\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"walker-%d\", i),\n463\t\t\t\tnodeList,\n464\t\t\t\tspeed,\n465\t\t\t\twaitTime,\n466\t\t\t)\n467\t\n468\t\t\t// Start at first node position\n469\t\t\twalker.Position = nodeList[0].Position\n470\t\t\twalker.NodeIndex = 1 // Target is second node\n471\t\n472\t\t\tws.Add(walker)\n473\t\t}\n474\t\n475\t\treturn ws\n476\t}\n477\t\n478\t// CreateNodeToNodeWalkersNoWait creates node-to-node walkers that don't wait at nodes\n479\tfunc CreateNodeToNodeWalkersNoWait(count int, nodes *NodeSet, speed float64) *WalkerSet {\n480\t\treturn CreateNodeToNodeWalkers(count, nodes, speed, 0)\n481\t}\n482\t\n483\t// SimulationTick represents one tick of simulation state\n484\ttype SimulationTick struct {\n485\t\tTimestamp time.Time `json:\"timestamp\"`\n486\t\tWalkers   []*Walker `json:\"walkers\"`\n487\t}\n488\t\n489\t// GenerateTicks generates simulation ticks at the given rate for a duration\n490\tfunc (ws *WalkerSet) GenerateTicks(rateHz int, duration time.Duration, space *Space) <-chan SimulationTick {\n491\t\t// Use buffered channel to avoid race condition where producer\n492\t\t// finishes before consumer starts\n493\t\tout := make(chan SimulationTick, 100)\n494\t\n495\t\tgo func() {\n496\t\t\tdefer close(out)\n497\t\n498\t\t\tdt := 1.0 / float64(rateHz)\n499\t\t\tstart := time.Now()\n500\t\t\tvar elapsed time.Duration\n501\t\n502\t\t\tfor elapsed < duration {\n503\t\t\t\ttick := SimulationTick{\n504\t\t\t\t\tTimestamp: start.Add(elapsed),\n505\t\t\t\t\tWalkers:   make([]*Walker, len(ws.walkers)),\n506\t\t\t\t}\n507\t\n508\t\t\t\t// Update all walkers\n509\t\t\t\tws.Update(dt, space)\n510\t\n511\t\t\t\t// Copy current walker states\n512\t\t\t\tfor i, w := range ws.walkers {\n513\t\t\t\t\t// Create a copy of the walker\n514\t\t\t\t\twCopy := *w\n515\t\t\t\t\ttick.Walkers[i] = &wCopy\n516\t\t\t\t}\n517\t\n518\t\t\t\tselect {\n519\t\t\t\tcase out <- tick:\n520\t\t\t\tdefault:\n521\t\t\t\t\t// Channel full, skip this tick\n522\t\t\t\t}\n523\t\n524\t\t\t\telapsed += time.Duration(float64(dt) * float64(time.Second))\n525\t\t\t}\n526\t\t}()\n527\t\n528\t\treturn out\n529\t}\n530\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"6b3b417b-ffca-4e51-853f-9cbdc68e2df1","uuid":"d36832ea-aa48-4f86-a457-3dd94f03e6a6","timestamp":"2026-05-06T03:27:49.117Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/home/coding/spaxel/mothership/internal/simulator/walker.go","content":"package `json:\"name,omitempty\"`\n\tPosition   Point      `json:\"position\"`\n\tVelocity   Point      `json:\"velocity\"`\n\tType       WalkerType `json:\"type\"`\n\tPath       []Point (seconds)\n\tShouldWait bool       `json:\"should_wait,omitempty\"` // Whether to wait at nodes\n}\n\n// NewWalker creates a new walker at the given position\nfunc NewWalker(id string, position Point) *Walker {\n\treturn &Walker{\n\t\tID:       id,\n\t\tPosition: position,\n\t\tType:     WalkerTypeRandomWalk,\n\t\tSpeed:    1.0,  // 1 m/s default\n\t\tHeight:   1.7,  // Average person height\n\t\tVelocity: Point{X: 0, Y: 0, Z: 0},\n\t}\n}\n\n// NewRandomWalker creates a walker with random motion\nfunc NewRandomWalker(id string, position Point, speed float64) *Walker {\n\tw := NewWalker(id, position)\n\tw.Type = WalkerTypeRandomWalk\n\tw.Speed = speed\n\t// Initial random velocity\n\tangle := rand.Float64() * 2 * math.Pi\n\tw.Velocity = Point{\n\t\tX: math.Cos(angle) * speed * 0.5,\n\t\tY: math.Sin(angle) * speed * 0.5,\n\t\tZ: 0,\n\t}\n\treturn w\n}\n\n// NewPathWalker creates a walker that follows a predefined path\nfunc NewPathWalker(id string, path []Point, speed float64) *Walker {\n\tif len(path) == 0 {\n\t\tpanic(\"path cannot be empty\")\n\t}\n\tw := NewWalker(id, path[0])\n\tw.Type = WalkerTypePathFollow\n\tw.Path = path\n\tw.PathIndex = 0\n\tw.Speed = speed\n\treturn w\n}\n\n// NewNodeToNodeWalker creates a walker that traverses between virtual nodes\nfunc NewNodeToNodeWalker(id string, nodes []*Node, speed float64, waitTime float64) *Walker {\n\tif len(nodes) == 0 {\n\t\tpanic(\"nodes cannot be empty\")\n\t}\n\tif len(nodes) == 1 {\n\t\tpanic(\"need at least 2 nodes for node-to-node traversal\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Start at the first node\n\tw := NewWalker(id, nodes[0].Position)\n\tw.Type = WalkerTypeNodeToNode\n\tw.Nodes = nodes\n\tw.NodeIndex = 1 // Target is the second node\n\tw.Speed = speed\n\tw.WaitTime = waitTime\n\tw.WaitTimer = waitTime\n\tw.ShouldWait = waitTime > 0\n\n\treturn w\n}\n\n// NewNodeToNodeWalkerNoWait creates a walker that traverses between nodes without waiting\nfunc NewNodeToNodeWalkerNoWait(id string, nodes []*Node, speed float64) *Walker {\n\treturn NewNodeToNodeWalker(id, nodes, speed, 0)\n}\n\n// Update updates the walker's position based on their movement type\n// dt is the time step in seconds\nfunc (w *Walker) Update(dt float64, space *Space) {\n\tswitch w.Type {\n\tcase WalkerTypeRandomWalk:\n\t\tw.updateRandomWalk(dt, space)\n\tcase WalkerTypePathFollow:\n\t\tw.updatePathFollow(dt)\n\tcase WalkerTypeNodeToNode:\n\t\tw.updateNodeToNode(dt, space)\n\t}\n}\n\n// updateRandomWalk implements random walk motion\nfunc (w *Walker) updateRandomWalk(dt float64, space *Space) {\n\t// Update position\n\tw.Position.X += w.Velocity.X * dt\n\tw.Position.Y += w.Velocity.Y * dt\n\n\t// Get space bounds for collision\n\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, _ := space.Bounds()\n\n\t// Bounce off walls (with some margin)\n\tmargin := 0.2 // 20cm margin\n\tif w.Position.X < minX+margin {\n\t\tw.Position.X = minX + margin\n\t\tw.Velocity.X *= -1\n\t}\n\tif w.Position.X > maxX-margin {\n\t\tw.Position.X = maxX - margin\n\t\tw.Velocity.X *= -1\n\t}\n\tif w.Position.Y < minY+margin {\n\t\tw.Position.Y = minY + margin\n\t\tw.Velocity.Y *= -1\n\t}\n\tif w.Position.Y > maxY-margin {\n\t\tw.Position.Y = maxY - margin\n\t\tw.Velocity.Y *= -1\n\t}\n\n\t// Random velocity perturbation (simulates human motion)\n\t// Change direction gradually, not abruptly\n\tperturbation := 0.1 // rad/s\n\tangle := math.Atan2(w.Velocity.Y, w.Velocity.X)\n\tangle += (rand.Float64() - 0.5) * perturbation * dt\n\n\t// Clamp velocity magnitude\n\tcurrentSpeed := math.Sqrt(w.Velocity.X*w.Velocity.X + w.Velocity.Y*w.Velocity.Y)\n\ttargetSpeed := w.Speed * (0.5 + rand.Float64()*0.5) // 50%-100% of set speed\n\tnewSpeed := currentSpeed + (targetSpeed-currentSpeed)*0.1 // Smooth speed change\n\n\tmaxSpeed := w.Speed * 1.5\n\tif newSpeed > maxSpeed {\n\t\tnewSpeed = maxSpeed\n\t}\n\n\tw.Velocity.X = math.Cos(angle) * newSpeed\n\tw.Velocity.Y = math.Sin(angle) * newSpeed\n\n\t// Keep Z at person height (standing)\n\tw.Position.Z = w.Height\n}\n\n// updatePathFollow implements path-following motion\nfunc (w *Walker) updatePathFollow(dt float64) {\n\tif len(w.Path) == 0 {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Get current target point\n\ttarget := w.Path[w.PathIndex]\n\n\t// Vector to target\n\tdx := target.X - w.Position.X\n\tdy := target.Y - w.Position.Y\n\tdz := target.Z - w.Position.Z\n\tdist := math.Sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy + dz*dz)\n\n\t// If very close to target, move to next point\n\tif dist < 0.1 {\n\t\tw.PathIndex = (w.PathIndex + 1) % len(w.Path)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Move towards target at constant speed\n\tmoveDist := w.Speed * dt\n\tif moveDist > dist {\n\t\tmoveDist = dist\n\t}\n\n\tt := moveDist / dist\n\tw.Position.X += dx * t\n\tw.Position.Y += dy * t\n\n\t// Update velocity vector for consistency\n\tw.Velocity.X = (dx / dist) * w.Speed\n\tw.Velocity.Y = (dy / dist) * w.Speed\n\tw.Velocity.Z = (dz / dist) * w.Speed\n}\n\n// updateNodeToNode implements traversal between virtual nodes\nfunc (w *Walker) updateNodeToNode(dt float64, space *Space) {\n\t// If no nodes configured, fall back to random walk\n\tif len(w.Nodes) == 0 {\n\t\tw.updateRandomWalk(dt, space)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Get current target node\n\ttargetNode := w.Nodes[w.NodeIndex]\n\ttargetPos := targetNode.Position\n\n\t// Vector to target\n\tdx := targetPos.X - w.Position.X\n\tdy := targetPos.Y - w.Position.Y\n\tdz := targetPos.Z - w.Position.Z\n\tdist := math.Sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy + dz*dz)\n\n\t// Horizontal distance (X/Y only) for arrival detection\n\t// Walkers maintain constant height, so we check horizontal proximity\n\thorizontalDist := math.Sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy)\n\n\t// Check if we've arrived at the target node\n\tif horizontalDist < 0.3 { // Within 30cm horizontally of node\n\t\t// Wait at node if configured\n\t\tif w.ShouldWait {\n\t\t\tif w.WaitTimer > 0 {\n\t\t\t\t// Still waiting\n\t\t\t\tw.WaitTimer -= dt\n\t\t\t\t// Set velocity to zero while waiting\n\t\t\t\tw.Velocity = Point{X: 0, Y: 0, Z: 0}\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t// Done waiting, reset timer for next node\n\t\t\tw.WaitTimer = w.WaitTime\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Move to next node\n\t\tw.NodeIndex = (w.NodeIndex + 1) % len(w.Nodes)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Move towards target node\n\t// Calculate speed variation for realism (0.8x to 1.2x base speed)\n\tspeedVariation := 0.8 + 0.4*rand.Float64()\n\tcurrentSpeed := w.Speed * speedVariation\n\n\t// Accelerate/decelerate naturally when starting/stopping\n\tmaxSpeed := currentSpeed\n\tif horizontalDist < 1.0 {\n\t\t// Slow down when approaching target\n\t\tmaxSpeed = currentSpeed * (horizontalDist / 1.0)\n\t\tif maxSpeed < 0.1 {\n\t\t\tmaxSpeed = 0.1\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tmoveDist := maxSpeed * dt\n\tif moveDist > horizontalDist {\n\t\tmoveDist = horizontalDist\n\t}\n\n\tt := moveDist / horizontalDist\n\tw.Position.X += dx * t\n\tw.Position.Y += dy * t\n\n\t// Update velocity vector for consistency\n\tw.Velocity.X = (dx / horizontalDist) * maxSpeed\n\tw.Velocity.Y = (dy / horizontalDist) * maxSpeed\n\tw.Velocity.Z = (dz / dist) * maxSpeed\n\n\t// Keep walker at standing height\n\tw.Position.Z = w.Height\n}\n\n// WalkerSet is a collection of walkers\ntype WalkerSet struct {\n\twalkers []*Walker\n}\n\n// NewWalkerSet creates an empty walker set\nfunc NewWalkerSet() *WalkerSet {\n\treturn &WalkerSet{walkers: make([]*Walker, 0)}\n}\n\n// Add adds a walker\nfunc (ws *WalkerSet) Add(w *Walker) {\n\tws.walkers = append(ws.walkers, w)\n}\n\n// AddRandomWalker adds a random walker at the given position\nfunc (ws *WalkerSet) AddRandomWalker(id string, position Point, speed float64) {\n\tws.Add(NewRandomWalker(id, position, speed))\n}\n\n// AddPathWalker adds a path-following walker\nfunc (ws *WalkerSet) AddPathWalker(id string, path []Point, speed float64) {\n\tws.Add(NewPathWalker(id, path, speed))\n}\n\n// AddNodeToNodeWalker adds a node-to-node traversal walker\nfunc (ws *WalkerSet) AddNodeToNodeWalker(id string, nodes []*Node, speed float64, waitTime float64) {\n\tws.Add(NewNodeToNodeWalker(id, nodes, speed, waitTime))\n}\n\n// AddNodeToNodeWalkerNoWait adds a node-to-node walker that doesn't wait at nodes\nfunc (ws *WalkerSet) AddNodeToNodeWalkerNoWait(id string, nodes []*Node, speed float64) {\n\tws.Add(NewNodeToNodeWalkerNoWait(id, nodes, speed))\n}\n\n// Count returns the number of walkers\nfunc (ws *WalkerSet) Count() int {\n\treturn len(ws.walkers)\n}\n\n// All returns all walkers\nfunc (ws *WalkerSet) All() []*Walker {\n\treturn ws.walkers\n}\n\n// GetByID returns a walker by ID\nfunc (ws *WalkerSet) GetByID(id string) *Walker {\n\tfor _, w := range ws.walkers {\n\t\tif w.ID == id {\n\t\t\treturn w\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// Remove removes a walker by ID\nfunc (ws *WalkerSet) Remove(id string) bool {\n\tfor i, w := range ws.walkers {\n\t\tif w.ID == id {\n\t\t\tws.walkers = append(ws.walkers[:i], ws.walkers[i+1:]...)\n\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\n// Clear removes all walkers\nfunc (ws *WalkerSet) Clear() {\n\tws.walkers = make([]*Walker, 0)\n}\n\n// Update updates all walkers\nfunc (ws *WalkerSet) Update(dt float64, space *Space) {\n\tfor _, w := range ws.walkers {\n\t\tw.Update(dt, space)\n\t}\n}\n\n// Positions returns all walker positions\nfunc (ws *WalkerSet) Positions() []Point {\n\tpositions := make([]Point, len(ws.walkers))\n\tfor i, w := range ws.walkers {\n\t\tpositions[i] = w.Position\n\t}\n\treturn positions\n}\n\n// MarshalJSON implements custom JSON marshaling\nfunc (ws *WalkerSet) MarshalJSON() ([]byte, error) {\n\treturn json.Marshal(ws.walkers)\n}\n\n// UnmarshalJSON implements custom JSON unmarshaling\nfunc (ws *WalkerSet) UnmarshalJSON(data []byte) error {\n\treturn json.Unmarshal(data, &ws.walkers)\n}\n\n// CreateRandomWalkers creates random walkers distributed in the space\nfunc CreateRandomWalkers(count int, space *Space) *WalkerSet {\n\tws := NewWalkerSet()\n\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, _ := space.Bounds()\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < count; i++ {\n\t\tposition := Point{\n\t\t\tX: minX + rand.Float64()*(maxX-minX),\n\t\t\tY: minY + rand.Float64()*(maxY-minY),\n\t\t\tZ: 1.7, // Average person height\n\t\t}\n\t\tws.AddRandomWalker(\n\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"walker-%d\", i),\n\t\t\tposition,\n\t\t\t0.8+rand.Float64()*0.4, // 0.8-1.2 m/s\n\t\t)\n\t}\n\n\treturn ws\n}\n\n// CreatePathWalkers creates walkers that follow rectangular paths around the space perimeter\nfunc CreatePathWalkers(count int, space *Space) *WalkerSet {\n\tws := NewWalkerSet()\n\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, _ := space.Bounds()\n\n\t// Create a rectangular path around the perimeter\n\tpath := []Point{\n\t\t{X: minX + 0.5, Y: minY + 0.5, Z: 1.7},\n\t\t{X: maxX - 0.5, Y: minY + 0.5, Z: 1.7},\n\t\t{X: maxX - 0.5, Y: maxY - 0.5, Z: 1.7},\n\t\t{X: minX + 0.5, Y: maxY - 0.5, Z: 1.7},\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < count; i++ {\n\t\t// Offset each walker to start at different positions on the path\n\t\toffset := (float64(i) / float64(count)) * float64(len(path))\n\t\tstartIdx := int(offset) % len(path)\n\n\t\twalker := NewPathWalker(\n\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"walker-%d\", i),\n\t\t\tpath,\n\t\t\t0.8+rand.Float64()*0.4,\n\t\t)\n\t\twalker.PathIndex = startIdx\n\t\twalker.Position = path[startIdx]\n\t\tws.Add(walker)\n\t}\n\n\treturn ws\n}\n\n// CreateNodeToNodeWalkers creates walkers that traverse between virtual nodes\n// The walkers move from node to node, optionally waiting at each node\nfunc CreateNodeToNodeWalkers(count int, nodes *NodeSet, speed float64, waitTime float64) *WalkerSet {\n\tws := NewWalkerSet()\n\n\tallNodes := nodes.All()\n\tif len(allNodes) < 2 {\n\t\t// Not enough nodes, return empty set\n\t\treturn ws\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < count; i++ {\n\t\t// Each walker gets the same set of nodes but starts at a different target\n\t\t// Create a copy of nodes for this walker\n\t\tnodeList := make([]*Node, len(allNodes))\n\t\tcopy(nodeList, allNodes)\n\n\t\t// Shuffle the node order for variety (except first, keep it consistent)\n\t\tif i > 0 && len(nodeList) > 2 {\n\t\t\t// Simple rotation for variety\n\t\t\toffset := i % (len(nodeList) - 1)\n\t\t\tfor j := 0; j < offset; j++ {\n\t\t\t\t// Rotate nodes[1:] by one position\n\t\t\t\tfirst := nodeList[1]\n\t\t\t\tcopy(nodeList[1:], nodeList[2:])\n\t\t\t\tnodeList[len(nodeList)-1] = first\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\twalker := NewNodeToNodeWalker(\n\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"walker-%d\", i),\n\t\t\tnodeList,\n\t\t\tspeed,\n\t\t\twaitTime,\n\t\t)\n\n\t\t// Start at first node position\n\t\twalker.Position = nodeList[0].Position\n\t\twalker.NodeIndex = 1 // Target is second node\n\n\t\tws.Add(walker)\n\t}\n\n\treturn ws\n}\n\n// CreateNodeToNodeWalkersNoWait creates node-to-node walkers that don't wait at nodes\nfunc CreateNodeToNodeWalkersNoWait(count int, nodes *NodeSet, speed float64) *WalkerSet {\n\treturn CreateNodeToNodeWalkers(count, nodes, speed, 0)\n}\n\n// SimulationTick represents one tick of simulation state\ntype SimulationTick struct {\n\tTimestamp time.Time `json:\"timestamp\"`\n\tWalkers   []*Walker `json:\"walkers\"`\n}\n\n// GenerateTicks generates simulation ticks at the given rate for a duration\nfunc (ws *WalkerSet) GenerateTicks(rateHz int, duration time.Duration, space *Space) <-chan SimulationTick {\n\t// Use buffered channel to avoid race condition where producer\n\t// finishes before consumer starts\n\tout := make(chan SimulationTick, 100)\n\n\tgo func() {\n\t\tdefer close(out)\n\n\t\tdt := 1.0 / float64(rateHz)\n\t\tstart := time.Now()\n\t\tvar elapsed time.Duration\n\n\t\tfor elapsed < duration {\n\t\t\ttick := SimulationTick{\n\t\t\t\tTimestamp: start.Add(elapsed),\n\t\t\t\tWalkers:   make([]*Walker, len(ws.walkers)),\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Update all walkers\n\t\t\tws.Update(dt, space)\n\n\t\t\t// Copy current walker states\n\t\t\tfor i, w := range ws.walkers {\n\t\t\t\t// Create a copy of the walker\n\t\t\t\twCopy := *w\n\t\t\t\ttick.Walkers[i] = &wCopy\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tselect {\n\t\t\tcase out <- tick:\n\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\t// Channel full, skip this tick\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\telapsed += time.Duration(float64(dt) * float64(time.Second))\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\treturn out\n}\n","numLines":530,"startLine":1,"totalLines":530}}}

{\n116\t\tvar req struct {\n117\t\t\tSpace *simulator.Space `json:\"space\"`\n118\t\t}\n119\t\n120\t\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n121\t\t\t// Use default space if request body is empty/invalid\n122\t\t\treq.Space = simulator.DefaultSpace()\n123\t\t}\n124\t\n125\t\tif req.Space == nil {\n126\t\t\treq.Space = simulator.DefaultSpace()\n127\t\t}\n128\t\n129\t\t// Update the handler's space if provided\n130\t\tif req.Space != nil {\n131\t\t\th.mu.Lock()\n132\t\t\th.space = req.Space\n133\t\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n134\t\t}\n135\t\n136\t\t// Generate session ID\n137\t\tsessionID := fmt.Sprintf(\"sim_%d\", time.Now().UnixNano())\n138\t\n139\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n140\t\t\t\"session_id\": sessionID,\n141\t\t\t\"space\":      h.space,\n142\t\t})\n143\t}\n144\t\n145\t// GetSpace returns the current space definition\n146\tfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) GetSpace(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n147\t\th.mu.RLock()\n148\t\tdefer h.mu.RUnlock()\n149\t\n150\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, h.space)\n151\t}\n152\t\n153\t// SetSpace updates the space definition\n154\tfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) SetSpace(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n155\t\tvar space simulator.Space\n156\t\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&space); err != nil {\n157\t\t\trespondError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, \"invalid space JSON\")\n158\t\t\treturn\n159\t\t}\n160\t\n161\t\tif err := space.Validate(); err != nil {\n162\t\t\trespondError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, err.Error())\n163\t\t\treturn\n164\t\t}\n165\t\n166\t\th.mu.Lock()\n167\t\th.space = &space\n168\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n169\t\n170\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]string{\"status\": \"updated\"})\n171\t}\n172\t\n173\t// ValidateSpace validates the current space without modifying it\n174\tfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) ValidateSpace(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n175\t\th.mu.RLock()\n176\t\tdefer h.mu.RUnlock()\n177\t\n178\t\tif err := h.space.Validate(); err != nil {\n179\t\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n180\t\t\t\t\"valid\": false,\n181\t\t\t\t\"error\": err.Error(),\n182\t\t\t})\n183\t\t\treturn\n184\t\t}\n185\t\n186\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n187\t\t\t\"valid\":       true,\n188\t\t\t\"volume_m3\":   h.space.TotalVolume(),\n189\t\t\t\"bounds\":      getBoundsJSON(h.space),\n190\t\t\t\"room_count\":  len(h.space.Rooms),\n191\t\t\t\"wall_count\":  len(h.space.GetWalls()),\n192\t\t})\n193\t}\n194\t\n195\t// GetNodes returns all virtual nodes\n196\tfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) GetNodes(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n197\t\th.mu.RLock()\n198\t\tdefer h.mu.RUnlock()\n199\t\n200\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, h.nodes.All())\n201\t}\n202\t\n203\t// AddNode adds a new virtual node\n204\tfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) AddNode(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n205\t\tvar node simulator.Node\n206\t\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&node); err != nil {\n207\t\t\trespondError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, \"invalid node JSON\")\n208\t\t\treturn\n209\t\t}\n210\t\n211\t\th.mu.Lock()\n212\t\th.nodes.Add(&node)\n213\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n214\t\n215\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusCreated, node)\n216\t}\n217\t\n218\t// UpdateNode updates an existing node\n219\tfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) UpdateNode(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n220\t\tnodeID := chi.URLParam(r, \"nodeID\")\n221\t\n222\t\tvar node simulator.Node\n223\t\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&node); err != nil {\n224\t\t\trespondError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, \"invalid node JSON\")\n225\t\t\treturn\n226\t\t}\n227\t\n228\t\tnode.ID = nodeID // Ensure ID matches URL parameter\n229\t\n230\t\th.mu.Lock()\n231\t\t// Remove old node and add updated one\n232\t\th.nodes.Remove(nodeID)\n233\t\th.nodes.Add(&node)\n234\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n235\t\n236\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, node)\n237\t}\n238\t\n239\t// RemoveNode removes a virtual node\n240\tfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) RemoveNode(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n241\t\tnodeID := chi.URLParam(r, \"nodeID\")\n242\t\n243\t\th.mu.Lock()\n244\t\tremoved := h.nodes.Remove(nodeID)\n245\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n246\t\n247\t\tif !removed {\n248\t\t\trespondError(w, http.StatusNotFound, \"node not found\")\n249\t\t\treturn\n250\t\t}\n251\t\n252\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]string{\"status\": \"removed\"})\n253\t}\n254\t\n255\t// SuggestNodes suggests optimal node positions for the current space\n256\tfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) SuggestNodes(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n257\t\t// Parse count from query string\n258\t\tcountStr := r.URL.Query().Get(\"count\")\n259\t\tcount, err := strconv.Atoi(countStr)\n260\t\tif err != nil || count < 1 {\n261\t\t\tcount = 4 // Default to 4 nodes\n262\t\t}\n263\t\n264\t\th.mu.RLock()\n265\t\tspace := h.space\n266\t\th.mu.RUnlock()\n267\t\n268\t\tsuggested := simulator.SuggestedNodes(space, count)\n269\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, suggested.All())\n270\t}\n271\t\n272\t// OptimizeNodes optimizes node positions for best coverage\n273\tfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) OptimizeNodes(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n274\t\t// Parse parameters\n275\t\tcountStr := r.URL.Query().Get(\"count\")\n276\t\tcount, err := strconv.Atoi(countStr)\n277\t\tif err != nil || count < 1 {\n278\t\t\tcount = 4\n279\t\t}\n280\t\n281\t\titerationsStr := r.URL.Query().Get(\"iterations\")\n282\t\titerations, err := strconv.Atoi(iterationsStr)\n283\t\tif err != nil || iterations < 1 {\n284\t\t\titerations = 50 // Default iterations\n285\t\t}\n286\t\n287\t\th.mu.RLock()\n288\t\tspace := h.space\n289\t\th.mu.RUnlock()\n290\t\n291\t\toptimized := simulator.OptimizeNodePositions(space, count, iterations)\n292\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, optimized.All())\n293\t}\n294\t\n295\t// GetWalkers returns all walkers\n296\tfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) GetWalkers(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n297\t\th.mu.RLock()\n298\t\tdefer h.mu.RUnlock()\n299\t\n300\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, h.walkers.All())\n301\t}\n302\t\n303\t// AddWalker adds a new walker\n304\tfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) AddWalker(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n305\t\tvar walker simulator.Walker\n306\t\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&walker); err != nil {\n307\t\t\trespondError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, \"invalid walker JSON\")\n308\t\t\treturn\n309\t\t}\n310\t\n311\t\th.mu.Lock()\n312\t\th.walkers.Add(&walker)\n313\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n314\t\n315\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusCreated, walker)\n316\t}\n317\t\n318\t// AddRandomWalkers adds random walkers to the simulation\n319\tfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) AddRandomWalkers(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n320\t\t// Parse count from query string\n321\t\tcountStr := r.URL.Query().Get(\"count\")\n322\t\tcount, err := strconv.Atoi(countStr)\n323\t\tif err != nil || count < 1 {\n324\t\t\tcount = 1\n325\t\t}\n326\t\n327\t\th.mu.RLock()\n328\t\tspace := h.space\n329\t\th.mu.RUnlock()\n330\t\n331\t\twalkers := simulator.CreateRandomWalkers(count, space)\n332\t\n333\t\th.mu.Lock()\n334\t\tfor _, w := range walkers.All() {\n335\t\t\th.walkers.Add(w)\n336\t\t}\n337\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n338\t\n339\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusCreated, walkers.All())\n340\t}\n341\t\n342\t// AddPathWalkers adds path-following walkers\n343\tfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) AddPathWalkers(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n344\t\t// Parse count from query string\n345\t\tcountStr := r.URL.Query().Get(\"count\")\n346\t\tcount, err := strconv.Atoi(countStr)\n347\t\tif err != nil || count < 1 {\n348\t\t\tcount = 1\n349\t\t}\n350\t\n351\t\th.mu.RLock()\n352\t\tspace := {\n359\t\t\th.walkers.Add(w)\n360\t\t}\n361\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n362\t\n363\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusCreated, walkers.All())\n364\t}\n365\t\n366\t// RemoveWalker removes a walker\n367\tfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) RemoveWalker(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n368\t\twalkerID := chi.URLParam(r, \"walkerID\")\n369\t\n370\t\th.mu.Lock()\n371\t\tremoved := h.walkers.Remove(walkerID)\n372\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n373\t\n374\t\tif !removed {\n375\t\t\trespondError(w, http.StatusNotFound, \"walker not found\")\n376\t\t\treturn\n377\t\t}\n378\t\n379\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]string{\"status\": \"removed\"})\n380\t}\n381\t\n382\t// GDOPRequest contains parameters for GDOP computation\n383\ttype GDOPRequest struct {\n384\t\tCellSize  float64 `json:\"cell_size\"`  // Grid cell size in meters\n385\t\tMaxZone   int     `json:\"max_zone\"`   // Maximum Fresnel zone to consider\n386\t\tThreshold float64 `json:\"threshold\"`  // DeltaRMS threshold for active links\n387\t}\n388\t\n389\t// GDOPResponse contains GDOP computation results\n390\ttype GDOPResponse struct {\n391\t\tResults        [][]simulator.GDOPResult `json:\"results\"`\n392\t\tCoverageScore  float64                   `json:\"coverage_score\"`\n393\t\tAverageGDOP    float64                   `json:\"average_gdop\"`\n394\t\tQualityCounts  map[string]int            `json:\"quality_counts\"`\n395\t\tDeadZones      []simulator.Point         `json:\"dead_zones\"`\n396\t\tRecommendedPos simulator.Point          `json:\"recommended_position\"`\n397\t\tLinks          []simulator.Link          `json:\"links\"`\n398\t}\n399\t\n400\t// ComputeGDOP computes GDOP for the current configuration\n401\tfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) ComputeGDOP(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n402\t\tvar req GDOPRequest\n403\t\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n404\t\t\t// Use defaults if request body is empty\n405\t\t\treq = GDOPRequest{\n406\t\t\t\tCellSize:  0.2,\n407\t\t\t\tMaxZone:   3,\n408\t\t\t\tThreshold: 0.02,\n409\t\t\t}\n410\t\t}\n411\t\n412\t\th.mu.RLock()\n413\t\tspace := h.space\n414\t\tnodes := h.nodes\n415\t\th.mu.RUnlock()\n416\t\n417\t\tif nodes.Count() < 2 {\n418\t\t\trespondError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, \"need at least 2 nodes for GDOP computation\")\n419\t\t\treturn\n420\t\t}\n421\t\n422\t\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, _ := space.Bounds()\n423\t\n424\t\t// Generate links\n425\t\tlinks := simulator.GenerateAllLinks(nodes)\n426\t\n427\t\t// Create GDOP computer\n428\t\tconfig := simulator.GridConfig{\n429\t\t\tMinX:     minX,\n430\t\t\tMinY:     minY,\n431\t\t\tWidth:    maxX - minX,\n432\t\t\tDepth:    maxY - minY,\n433\t\t\tCellSize: req.CellSize,\n434\t\t}\n435\t\tgdopComp := simulator.NewGDOPComputer(links, config)\n436\t\tif req.MaxZone > 0 {\n437\t\t\tgdopComp.SetMaxZone(req.MaxZone)\n438\t\t}\n439\t\n440\t\t// Compute GDOP\n441\t\tresults := gdopComp.ComputeAll()\n442\t\n443\t\t// Compute statistics\n444\t\tcoverageScore := gdopComp.CoverageScore(results)\n445\t\tavgGDOP := gdopComp.AverageGDOP(results)\n446\t\tqualityCounts := gdopComp.QualityCounts(results)\n447\t\tdeadZones := gdopComp.FindDeadZones(results)\n448\t\trecommendedPos := gdopComp.RecommendNodePosition(results, space)\n449\t\n450\t\tresponse := GDOPResponse{\n451\t\t\tResults:        results,\n452\t\t\tCoverageScore:  coverageScore,\n453\t\t\tAverageGDOP:    avgGDOP,\n454\t\t\tQualityCounts:  qualityCounts,\n455\t\t\tDeadZones:      deadZones,\n456\t\t\tRecommendedPos: recommendedPos,\n457\t\t\tLinks:          links,\n458\t\t}\n459\t\n460\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, response)\n461\t}\n462\t\n463\t// GetCoverageScore returns just the coverage score for quick assessment\n464\tfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) GetCoverageScore(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n465\t\th.mu.RLock()\n466\t\tspace := h.space\n467\t\tnodes := h.nodes\n468\t\th.mu.RUnlock()\n469\t\n470\t\tif nodes.Count() < 2 {\n471\t\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n472\t\t\t\t\"coverage_percent\": 0,\n473\t\t\t\t\"minimum_nodes\":    simulator.MinimumNodeCount(space, 4.0),\n474\t\t\t\t\"current_nodes\":    nodes.Count(),\n475\t\t\t})\n476\t\t\treturn\n477\t\t}\n478\t\n479\t\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, _ := space.Bounds()\n480\t\tlinks := simulator.GenerateAllLinks(nodes)\n481\t\n482\t\tconfig := simulator.GridConfig{\n483\t\t\tMinX:     minX,\n484\t\t\tMinY:     minY,\n485\t\t\tWidth:    maxX - minX,\n486\t\t\tDepth:    maxY - minY,\n487\t\t\tCellSize: 0.2,\n488\t\t}\n489\t\tgdopComp := simulator.NewGDOPComputer(links, config)\n490\t\tresults := gdopComp.ComputeAll()\n491\t\n492\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n493\t\t\t\"coverage_percent\": gdopComp.CoverageScore(results),\n494\t\t\t\"minimum_nodes\":    simulator.MinimumNodeCount(space, 4.0),\n495\t\t\t\"current_nodes\":    nodes.Count(),\n496\t\t\t\"average_gdop\":     gdopComp.AverageGDOP(results),\n497\t\t})\n498\t}\n499\t\n500\t// GetGDOPHeatmap returns GDOP data in a format suitable for heatmap visualization\n501\tfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) GetGDOPHeatmap(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n502\t\th.mu.RLock()\n503\t\tspace := h.space\n504\t\tnodes := h.nodes\n505\t\th.mu.RUnlock()\n506\t\n507\t\tif nodes.Count() < 2 {\n508\t\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n509\t\t\t\t\"gdop_map\":         []float64{},\n510\t\t\t\t\"grid_dimensions\": []int{0, 0, 0},\n511\t\t\t\t\"coverage_percent\": 0,\n512\t\t\t\t\"error\":            \"need at least 2 nodes\",\n513\t\t\t})\n514\t\t\treturn\n515\t\t}\n516\t\n517\t\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, _ := space.Bounds()\n518\t\tlinks := simulator.GenerateAllLinks(nodes)\n519\t\n520\t\tconfig := simulator.GridConfig{\n521\t\t\tMinX:     minX,\n522\t\t\tMinY:     minY,\n523\t\t\tWidth:    maxX - minX,\n524\t\t\tDepth:    maxY - minY,\n525\t\t\tCellSize: 0.2,\n526\t\t}\n527\t\tgdopComp := simulator.NewGDOPComputer(links, config)\n528\t\tresults := gdopComp.ComputeAll()\n529\t\n530\t\t// Convert results to heatmap format\n531\t\tdepth := len(results)\n532\t\twidth := 0\n533\t\tif depth > 0 {\n534\t\t\twidth = len(results[0])\n535\t\t}\n536\t\n537\t\t// Flatten GDOP values into 1D array (row-major order)\n538\t\tgdopMap := make([]float64, width*depth)\n539\t\tfor y := 0; y < depth; y++ {\n540\t\t\tfor x := 0; x < width; x++ {\n541\t\t\t\tidx := y*width + x\n542\t\t\t\tif math.IsInf(results[y][x].GDOP, 0) {\n543\t\t\t\t\tgdopMap[idx] = 9999.0 // Use 9999 to represent infinity\n544\t\t\t\t} else {\n545\t\t\t\t\tgdopMap[idx] = results[y][x].GDOP\n546\t\t\t\t}\n547\t\t\t}\n548\t\t}\n549\t\n550\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n551\t\t\t\"gdop_map\":         gdopMap,\n552\t\t\t\"grid_dimensions\": []int{width, depth, 1}, // 2D heatmap, so height = 1\n553\t\t\t\"coverage_percent\": gdopComp.CoverageScore(results),\n554\t\t\t\"average_gdop\":     gdopComp.AverageGDOP(results),\n555\t\t\t\"quality_counts\":   gdopComp.QualityCounts(results),\n556\t\t})\n557\t}\n558\t\n559\t// GetShoppingList returns hardware recommendations\n560\tfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) GetShoppingList(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n561\t\th.mu.RLock()\n562\t\tspace := h.space\n563\t\tnodes := h.nodes\n564\t\th.mu.RUnlock()\n565\t\n566\t\tshoppingList := simulator.GenerateShoppingList(space, nodes)\n567\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, shoppingList)\n568\t}\n569\t\n570\t// SimulationRequest contains parameters for running a simulation\n571\ttype SimulationRequest struct {\n572\t\tDurationSec int     `json:\"duration_sec\"` // Simulation duration in seconds\n573\t\tRateHz      int     `json:\"rate_hz\"`      // Update rate in Hz\n574\t\tThreshold   float64 `json:\"threshold\"`    // DeltaRMS threshold\n575\t}\n576\t\n577\t// SimulationResponse contains simulation results\n578\ttype SimulationResponse struct {\n579\t\tWalkerPositions []simulator.Point `json:\"walker_positions\"`\n580\t\tLinkActivity    map[string]float64 `json:\"link_activity\"`\n581\t\tDuration        int                `json:\"duration\"`\n582\t\tTicks           int                `json:\"ticks\"`\n583\t}\n584\t\n585\t// RunSimulation runs a time-step simulation with the current configuration\n586\tfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) RunSimulation(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n587\t\tvar req SimulationRequest\n588\t\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n589\t\t\treq = SimulationRequest{\n590\t\t\t\tDurationSec: 10,\n591\t\t\t\tRateHz:      10,\n592\t\t\t\tThreshold:   0.02,\n593\t\t\t}\n594\t\t}\n595\t\n596\t\th.mu.RLock()\n597\t\tspace := h.space\n598\t\tnodes := h.nodes\n599\t\twalkers := h.walkers\n600\t\th.mu.RUnlock()\n601\t\n602\t\tif walkers.Count() == 0 {\n603\t\t\trespondError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, \"no walkers in simulation\")\n604\t\t\treturn\n605\t\t}\n606\t\n607\t\tif nodes.Count() < 2 {\n608\t\t\trespondError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, \"need at least 2 nodes for simulation\")\n609\t\t\treturn\n610\t\t}\n611\t\n612\t\t// Create propagation model\n613\t\tpropModel := simulator.NewPropagationModel(space)\n614\t\n615\t\t// Generate all links\n616\t\tlinks := simulator.GenerateAllLinks(nodes)\n617\t\n618\t\t// Run simulation ticks\n619\t\tdt := 1.0 / float64(req.RateHz)\n620\t\tnumTicks := req.DurationSec * req.RateHz\n621\t\n622\t\t// Collect final positions and link activity\n623\t\tfinalPositions := make([]simulator.Point, 0)\n624\t\tlinkActivity := make(map[string]float64)\n625\t\n626\t\tfor tick := 0; tick < numTicks; tick++ {\n627\t\t\t// Update walker positions\n628\t\t\twalkers.Update(dt, space)\n629\t\n630\t\t\t// Compute link activity\n631\t\t\tfor _, link := range links {\n632\t\t\t\tlinkID := link.TX.ID + \":\" + link.RX.ID\n633\t\t\t\tmaxDelta := 0.0\n634\t\n635\t\t\t\tfor _, walker := range walkers.All() {\n636\t\t\t\t\tdelta := propModel.ComputeLinkActivity(link, walker.Position, req.Threshold)\n637\t\t\t\t\tif delta > maxDelta {\n638\t\t\t\t\t\tmaxDelta = delta\n639\t\t\t\t\t}\n640\t\t\t\t}\n641\t\n642\t\t\t\tif maxDelta > linkActivity[linkID] {\n643\t\t\t\t\tlinkActivity[linkID] = maxDelta\n644\t\t\t\t}\n645\t\t\t}\n646\t\t}\n647\t\n648\t\t// Collect final walker positions\n649\t\tfor _, w := range walkers.All() {\n650\t\t\tfinalPositions = append(finalPositions, w.Position)\n651\t\t}\n652\t\n653\t\tresponse := SimulationResponse{\n654\t\t\tWalkerPositions: finalPositions,\n655\t\t\tLinkActivity:    linkActivity,\n656\t\t\tDuration:        req.DurationSec,\n657\t\t\tTicks:           numTicks,\n658\t\t}\n659\t\n660\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, response)\n661\t}\n662\t\n663\t// Helper functions\n664\t\n665\tfunc getBoundsJSON(space *simulator.Space) map[string]float64 {\n666\t\tminX, minY, minZ, maxX, maxY, maxZ := space.Bounds()\n667\t\treturn map[string]float64{\n668\t\t\t\"min_x\": minX,\n669\t\t\t\"min_y\": minY,\n670\t\t\t\"min_z\": minZ,\n671\t\t\t\"max_x\": maxX,\n672\t\t\t\"max_y\": maxY,\n673\t\t\t\"max_z\": maxZ,\n674\t\t}\n675\t}\n676\t\n677\tfunc respondJSON(w http.ResponseWriter, status int, data interface{}) {\n678\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")\n679\t\tw.WriteHeader(status)\n680\t\tif err := json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(data); err simulation\nfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) AddRandomWalkers(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\t// Parse count from query string\n\tcountStr := r.URL.Query().Get(\"count\")\n\tcount, err := map[string]string{\"status\": \"removed\"})\n}\n\n// GDOPRequest contains parameters for GDOP computation\ntype GDOPRequest struct {\n\tCellSize  float64 `json:\"cell_size\"`  // Grid cell size in meters\n\tMaxZone   int     `json:\"max_zone\"`   // Maximum Fresnel zone to consider\n\tThreshold float64 `json:\"threshold\"`  // DeltaRMS threshold for active links\n}\n\n// GDOPResponse contains GDOP computation results\ntype GDOPResponse struct {\n\tResults        [][]simulator.GDOPResult `json:\"results\"`\n\tCoverageScore  float64                   `json:\"coverage_score\"`\n\tAverageGDOP    float64                   `json:\"average_gdop\"`\n\tQualityCounts  map[string]int            `json:\"quality_counts\"`\n\tDeadZones      []simulator.Point         `json:\"dead_zones\"`\n\tRecommendedPos simulator.Point          `json:\"recommended_position\"`\n\tLinks          []simulator.Link          `json:\"links\"`\n}\n\n// ComputeGDOP computes GDOP for the current configuration\nfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) ComputeGDOP(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tvar req GDOPRequest\n\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n\t\t// Use defaults if request body is empty\n\t\treq = GDOPRequest{\n\t\t\tCellSize:  0.2,\n\t\t\tMaxZone:   3,\n\t\t\tThreshold: 0.02,\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tspace := h.space\n\tnodes := h.nodes\n\th.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif nodes.Count() < 2 {\n\t\trespondError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, \"need at least 2 nodes for GDOP computation\")\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, _ := space.Bounds()\n\n\t// Generate links\n\tlinks := simulator.GenerateAllLinks(nodes)\n\n\t// Create GDOP computer\n\tconfig := simulator.GridConfig{\n\t\tMinX:     minX,\n\t\tMinY:     minY,\n\t\tWidth:    maxX - minX,\n\t\tDepth:    maxY - minY,\n\t\tCellSize: req.CellSize,\n\t}\n\tgdopComp := simulator.NewGDOPComputer(links, config)\n\tif req.MaxZone > 0 {\n\t\tgdopComp.SetMaxZone(req.MaxZone)\n\t}\n\n\t// Compute GDOP\n\tresults := gdopComp.ComputeAll()\n\n\t// Compute statistics\n\tcoverageScore := gdopComp.CoverageScore(results)\n\tavgGDOP := gdopComp.AverageGDOP(results)\n\tqualityCounts := gdopComp.QualityCounts(results)\n\tdeadZones := gdopComp.FindDeadZones(results)\n\trecommendedPos := gdopComp.RecommendNodePosition(results, space)\n\n\tresponse := GDOPResponse{\n\t\tResults:        results,\n\t\tCoverageScore:  coverageScore,\n\t\tAverageGDOP:    avgGDOP,\n\t\tQualityCounts:  qualityCounts,\n\t\tDeadZones:      deadZones,\n\t\tRecommendedPos: recommendedPos,\n\t\tLinks:          links,\n\t}\n\n\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, response)\n}\n\n// GetCoverageScore returns just the coverage score for quick assessment\nfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) GetCoverageScore(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tspace := h.space\n\tnodes := h.nodes\n\th.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif nodes.Count() < 2 {\n\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\"coverage_percent\": 0,\n\t\t\t\"minimum_nodes\":    simulator.MinimumNodeCount(space, 4.0),\n\t\t\t\"current_nodes\":    nodes.Count(),\n\t\t})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, _ := space.Bounds()\n\tlinks := simulator.GenerateAllLinks(nodes)\n\n\tconfig := simulator.GridConfig{\n\t\tMinX:     minX,\n\t\tMinY:     minY,\n\t\tWidth:    maxX - minX,\n\t\tDepth:    maxY - minY,\n\t\tCellSize: 0.2,\n\t}\n\tgdopComp := simulator.NewGDOPComputer(links, config)\n\tresults := gdopComp.ComputeAll()\n\n\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"coverage_percent\": gdopComp.CoverageScore(results),\n\t\t\"minimum_nodes\":    simulator.MinimumNodeCount(space, 4.0),\n\t\t\"current_nodes\":    nodes.Count(),\n\t\t\"average_gdop\":     gdopComp.AverageGDOP(results),\n\t})\n}\n\n// GetGDOPHeatmap returns GDOP data in a format suitable for heatmap visualization\nfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) GetGDOPHeatmap(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tspace := h.space\n\tnodes := h.nodes\n\th.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif nodes.Count() < 2 {\n\t\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\"gdop_map\":         []float64{},\n\t\t\t\"grid_dimensions\": []int{0, 0, 0},\n\t\t\t\"coverage_percent\": 0,\n\t\t\t\"error\":            \"need at least 2 nodes\",\n\t\t})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tminX, minY, _, maxX, maxY, _ := space.Bounds()\n\tlinks := simulator.GenerateAllLinks(nodes)\n\n\tconfig := simulator.GridConfig{\n\t\tMinX:     minX,\n\t\tMinY:     minY,\n\t\tWidth:    maxX - minX,\n\t\tDepth:    maxY - minY,\n\t\tCellSize: 0.2,\n\t}\n\tgdopComp := simulator.NewGDOPComputer(links, config)\n\tresults := gdopComp.ComputeAll()\n\n\t// Convert results to heatmap format\n\tdepth := len(results)\n\twidth := 0\n\tif depth > 0 {\n\t\twidth = len(results[0])\n\t}\n\n\t// Flatten GDOP values into 1D array (row-major order)\n\tgdopMap := make([]float64, width*depth)\n\tfor y := 0; y < depth; y++ {\n\t\tfor x := 0; x < width; x++ {\n\t\t\tidx := y*width + x\n\t\t\tif math.IsInf(results[y][x].GDOP, 0) {\n\t\t\t\tgdopMap[idx] = 9999.0 // Use 9999 to represent infinity\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tgdopMap[idx] = results[y][x].GDOP\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"gdop_map\":         gdopMap,\n\t\t\"grid_dimensions\": []int{width, depth, 1}, // 2D heatmap, so height = 1\n\t\t\"coverage_percent\": gdopComp.CoverageScore(results),\n\t\t\"average_gdop\":     gdopComp.AverageGDOP(results),\n\t\t\"quality_counts\":   gdopComp.QualityCounts(results),\n\t})\n}\n\n// GetShoppingList returns hardware recommendations\nfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) GetShoppingList(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tspace := h.space\n\tnodes := h.nodes\n\th.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tshoppingList := simulator.GenerateShoppingList(space, nodes)\n\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, shoppingList)\n}\n\n// SimulationRequest contains parameters for running a simulation\ntype SimulationRequest struct {\n\tDurationSec int     `json:\"duration_sec\"` // Simulation duration in seconds\n\tRateHz      int     `json:\"rate_hz\"`      // Update rate in Hz\n\tThreshold   float64 `json:\"threshold\"`    // DeltaRMS threshold\n}\n\n// SimulationResponse contains simulation results\ntype SimulationResponse struct {\n\tWalkerPositions []simulator.Point `json:\"walker_positions\"`\n\tLinkActivity    map[string]float64 `json:\"link_activity\"`\n\tDuration        int                `json:\"duration\"`\n\tTicks           int                `json:\"ticks\"`\n}\n\n// RunSimulation runs a time-step simulation with the current configuration\nfunc (h *SimulatorHandler) RunSimulation(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tvar req SimulationRequest\n\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n\t\treq = SimulationRequest{\n\t\t\tDurationSec: 10,\n\t\t\tRateHz:      10,\n\t\t\tThreshold:   0.02,\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tspace := h.space\n\tnodes := h.nodes\n\twalkers := h.walkers\n\th.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif walkers.Count() == 0 {\n\t\trespondError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, \"no walkers in simulation\")\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif nodes.Count() < 2 {\n\t\trespondError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, \"need at least 2 nodes for simulation\")\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Create propagation model\n\tpropModel := simulator.NewPropagationModel(space)\n\n\t// Generate all links\n\tlinks := simulator.GenerateAllLinks(nodes)\n\n\t// Run simulation ticks\n\tdt := 1.0 / float64(req.RateHz)\n\tnumTicks := req.DurationSec * req.RateHz\n\n\t// Collect final positions and link activity\n\tfinalPositions := make([]simulator.Point, 0)\n\tlinkActivity := make(map[string]float64)\n\n\tfor tick := 0; tick < numTicks; tick++ {\n\t\t// Update walker positions\n\t\twalkers.Update(dt, space)\n\n\t\t// Compute link activity\n\t\tfor _, link := range links {\n\t\t\tlinkID := link.TX.ID + \":\" + link.RX.ID\n\t\t\tmaxDelta := 0.0\n\n\t\t\tfor _, walker := range walkers.All() {\n\t\t\t\tdelta := propModel.ComputeLinkActivity(link, walker.Position, req.Threshold)\n\t\t\t\tif delta > maxDelta {\n\t\t\t\t\tmaxDelta = delta\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif maxDelta > linkActivity[linkID] {\n\t\t\t\tlinkActivity[linkID] = maxDelta\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Collect final walker positions\n\tfor _, w := range walkers.All() {\n\t\tfinalPositions = append(finalPositions, w.Position)\n\t}\n\n\tresponse := SimulationResponse{\n\t\tWalkerPositions: finalPositions,\n\t\tLinkActivity:    linkActivity,\n\t\tDuration:        req.DurationSec,\n\t\tTicks:           numTicks,\n\t}\n\n\trespondJSON(w, http.StatusOK, response)\n}\n\n// Helper functions\n\nfunc getBoundsJSON(space *simulator.Space) map[string]float64 {\n\tminX, minY, minZ, maxX, maxY, maxZ := space.Bounds()\n\treturn map[string]float64{\n\t\t\"min_x\": minX,\n\t\t\"min_y\": minY,\n\t\t\"min_z\": minZ,\n\t\t\"max_x\": maxX,\n\t\t\"max_y\": maxY,\n\t\t\"max_z\": maxZ,\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc respondJSON(w http.ResponseWriter, status int, data interface{}) {\n\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")\n\tw.WriteHeader(status)\n\tif err := json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(data); err != nil function selectNode(nodeId) {\n299\t        if (state.editingNode?.id === nodeId) return;\n300\t\n301\t        deselectNode();\n302\t\n303\t        const node = state.nodes.find(n => n.id === elements.spaceDepth ? parseFloat(elements.spaceDepth.value) : 8;\n335\t        const height = elements.spaceHeight ? parseFloat(elements.spaceHeight.value) : 2.5;\n336\t\n337\t        state.space = { address\n396\t        _virtualNodeCounter++;\n397\t        const mac = 'AA:BB:CC:' +\n398\t            (_virtualNodeCounter & 0xFF).toString(16).padStart(2, '0').toUpperCase() + ':' +\n399\t true,\n417\t        };\n418\t\n419\t        state.nodes.push(node);\n420\t        renderNodes();\n421\t        updateNodeVisualization(node);\n422\t        rebuildLinkLines();\n423\t\n424\t        // if this is the second node\n428\t        if (state.nodes.length >= 2 && !state.showGDOP) {\n429\t            toggleGDOP();\n430\t        }\n431\t\n432\t        console.log('[Simulate] Node added:',              <span style=\"font-size:var(--text-sm);\">${node.name}</span>\n463\t                <span style=\"font-size:var(--text-2xs);color:var(--text-muted);\">\n464\t                    (${node.position.x.toFixed(1)}, ${node.position.y.toFixed(1)}, ${node.position.z.toFixed(1)})\n465\t                </span>\n466\t                <button class=\"sim-item-delete\" elements.nodeList.appendChild(div);\n469\t\n470\t            // Add click handler for selection\n471\t            div.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n472\t                if }\n489\t\n490\t    // ============================================\n491\t    // GDOP Visualization\n492\t    // ============================================\n493\t    function toggleGDOP() {\n494\t        state.showGDOP = !state.showGDOP;\n495\t        if (state.showGDOP) {\n496\t            updateGDOP();\n497\t        } else {\n498\t            clearGDOPMesh();\n499\t        }\n500\t    }\n501\t\n502\t    async function updateGDOP() {\n503\t        if (state.nodes.length < 2) {\n504\t            console.warn('[Simulate] Need at least 2 nodes for GDOP');\n505\t            return;\n506\t        }\n507\t\n508\t        try {\n509\t            const response = await fetch('/api/simulator/gdop/heatmap', {\n510\t                method: 'GET',\n511\t                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n512\t            });\n513\t\n514\t            if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to compute GDOP');\n515\t\n516\t            const data = await response.json();\n517\t            state.gdopData = data;\n518\t            renderGDOP(data);\n519\t\n520\t            console.log('[Simulate] GDOP updated:', data);\n521\t        } catch (err) {\n522\t            console.error('[Simulate] Failed to update GDOP:', err);\n523\t        }\n524\t    }\n525\t\n526\t    function renderGDOP(data) {\n527\t        clearGDOPMesh();\n528\t\n529\t        if (!data.gdop_map || !data.grid_dimensions) {\n530\t            console.warn('[Simulate] Invalid GDOP data');\n531\t            return;\n532\t        }\n533\t\n534\t        // Create texture from GDOP data\n535\t        const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n536\t        const size = 256;\n537\t        canvas.width = size;\n538\t        canvas.height = size;\n539\t        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n540\t\n541\t        const imageData = ctx.createImageData(size, size);\n542\t\n543\t        // Grid dimensions from backend: [width_cells, depth_cells]\n544\t        const gridWidth = data.grid_dimensions[0];\n545\t        const gridDepth = data.grid_dimensions[1];\n546\t\n547\t        // gdop_map is a 1D flattened array: [x + y * width]\n548\t        // We render the 2D floor plane\n549\t\n550\t        for (let y = 0; y < size; y++) {\n551\t            for (let x = 0; x < size; x++) {\n552\t                // Map pixel to grid cell\n553\t                const gridX = Math.floor((x / size) * gridWidth);\n554\t                const gridY = Math.floor((y / size) * gridDepth);\n555\t\n556\t                // Calculate index in flattened array\n557\t                const idx = gridY * gridWidth + gridX;\n558\t\n559\t                // Get GDOP value (9999 = infinity)\n560\t                const gdop = data.gdop_map[idx] !== undefined ? data.gdop_map[idx] : 9999;\n561\t\n562\t                // Color based on GDOP quality (matching Go GDOPColorMap)\n563\t                let color;\n564\t                if (gdop >= 9999) {\n565\t                    color = { r: 80, g: 80, b: 80 }; // None - gray\n566\t                } else if (gdop < 2.0) {\n567\t                    color = { r: 34, g: 197, b: 94 }; // Excellent - green\n568\t                } else if (gdop < 4.0) {\n569\t                    color = { r: 255, g: 193, b: 7 }; // Good - yellow\n570\t                } else if (gdop < 8.0) {\n571\t                    color = { r: 255, g: 146, b: 0 }; // Fair - orange\n572\t                } else {\n573\t                    color = { r: 220, g: 53, b: 69 }; // Poor - red\n574\t                }\n575\t\n576\t                const i = (y * size + x) * 4;\n577\t                imageData.data[i] = color.r;\n578\t                imageData.data[i + 1] = color.g;\n579\t                imageData.data[i + 2] = color.b;\n580\t                imageData.data[i + 3] = 180; // Alpha\n581\t            }\n582\t        }\n583\t\n584\t        ctx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);\n585\t\n586\t        const texture = new THREE.CanvasTexture(canvas);\n587\t        texture.needsUpdate = true;\n588\t        const material = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({\n589\t            map: texture,\n590\t            transparent: true,\n591\t            opacity: 0.7,\n592\t            side: THREE.DoubleSide,\n593\t            depthWrite: false,\n594\t        });\n595\t\n596\t        const geometry = new THREE.PlaneGeometry(state.space.width, state.space.depth);\n597\t        _gdopMesh = new THREE.Mesh(geometry, material);\n598\t        _gdopMesh.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2;\n599\t        _gdopMesh.position.set(state.space.width / 2, 0.01, state.space.depth / 2);\n600\t\n601\t        // Get scene from Viz3D\n602\t        if (window.Viz3D) {\n603\t            const scene = window.Viz3D.getScene?.();\n604\t            if (scene) scene.add(_gdopMesh);\n605\t        }\n606\t\n607\t        // Update metrics\n608\t        if (data.coverage_score !== undefined && elements.metricCoverage) {\n609\t            const coveragePercent = (data.coverage_score * 100).toFixed(1);\n610\t            elements.metricCoverage.textContent = coveragePercent + '%';\n611\t        }\n612\t\n613\t        if (data.mean_gdop !== undefined && elements.metricGdop) {\n614\t            const meanGDOP = data.mean_gdop < 9999 ? data.mean_gdop.toFixed(2) : '∞';\n615\t            elements.metricGdop.textContent = meanGDOP;\n616\t        }\n617\t\n618\t        console.log('[Simulate] GDOP rendered');\n619\t    }\n620\t\n621\t    function clearGDOPMesh() {\n622\t        if (_gdopMesh) {\n623\t            const scene = window.Viz3D?.getScene?.();\n624\t            if (scene) scene.remove(_gdopMesh);\n625\t            _gdopMesh.geometry.dispose();\n626\t            _gdopMesh.material.dispose();\n627\t            _gdopMesh = null;\n628\t        }\n629\t    }\n630\t\n631\t    // ============================================\n632\t    // Simulation Control\n633\t    // ============================================\n634\t    async function startSimulation() {\n635\t        if (state.nodes.length < 2) {\n636\t            updateStatus('Error: Add at least 2 nodes first');\n637\t            return;\n638\t        }\n639\t\n640\t        updateStatus('Starting simulation...');\n641\t\n642\t        try {\n643\t            const response = await fetch('/api/simulator/simulate', {\n644\t                method: 'POST',\n645\t                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n646\t                body: JSON.stringify({\n647\t                    duration_sec: CONFIG.defaultDurationSec,\n648\t                    tick_rate_hz: CONFIG.tickRateHz,\n649\t                }),\n650\t            });\n651\t\n652\t            if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to start simulation');\n653\t\n654\t            const data = await response.json();\n655\t            state.simulationRunning = true;\n656\t            state.simulationPaused = false;\n657\t            state.simulationTime = 0;\n658\t\n659\t            // Update UI\n660\t            if (elements.simulateBtn) elements.simulateBtn.disabled = true;\n661\t            if (elements.stopBtn) elements.stopBtn.disabled = false;\n662\t\n663\t            // Start progress update\n664\t            startProgressLoop();\n665\t\n666\t            // Poll for results\n667\t            pollSimulationResults();\n668\t\n669\t            console.log('[Simulate] Simulation started');\n670\t        } catch (err) {\n671\t            console.error('[Simulate] Failed to start simulation:', err);\n672\t            updateStatus('Error: ' + err.message);\n673\t        }\n674\t    }\n675\t\n676\t    function stopSimulation() {\n677\t        state.simulationRunning = false;\n678\t        state.simulationPaused = false;\n679\t        state.simulationTime = 0;\n680\t\n681\t        // Update UI\n682\t        if (elements.simulateBtn) elements.simulateBtn.disabled = false;\n683\t        if (elements.stopBtn) elements.stopBtn.disabled = true;\n684\t\n685\t        updateStatus('Simulation stopped');\n686\t\n687\t        console.log('[Simulate] Simulation stopped');\n688\t    }\n689\t\n690\t    function resetSimulation() {\n691\t        stopSimulation();\n692\t        state.nodes = [];\n693\t        state.walkers = [];\n694\t        renderNodes();\n695\t        clearSimulationMeshes();\n696\t        clearGDOPMesh();\n697\t\n698\t        if (elements.metricCoverage) elements.metricCoverage.textContent = '--';\n699\t        if (elements.metricGdop) elements.metricGdop.textContent = '--';\n700\t        if (elements.metricBlobs) elements.metricBlobs.textContent = '--';\n701\t\n702\t        updateStatus('Simulation reset');\n703\t\n704\t        console.log('[Simulate] Simulation reset');\n705\t    }\n706\t\n707\t    function startProgressLoop() {\n708\t        const interval = setInterval(() => {\n709\t            if (!state.simulationRunning) {\n710\t                clearInterval(interval);\n711\t                return;\n712\t            }\n713\t\n714\t            if (!state.simulationPaused) {\n715\t                state.simulationTime += 0.1;\n716\t            }\n717\t        }, 100);\n718\t    }\n719\t\n720\t    async function pollSimulationResults() {\n721\t        const pollInterval = setInterval(async () => {\n722\t            if (!state.simulationRunning) {\n723\t                clearInterval(pollInterval);\n724\t                return;\n725\t            }\n726\t\n727\t            try {\n728\t                const response = await fetch('/api/simulator/status');\n729\t                if (!response.ok) return;\n730\t\n731\t                const data = await response.json();\n732\t\n733\t                // Update walker positions\n734\t                if (data.walker_positions) {\n735\t                    data.walker_positions.forEach(pos => {\n736\t                        const walker = state.walkers.find(w => w.id === pos.id);\n737\t                        if (walker) {\n738\t                            walker.position = pos.position;\n739\t                            updateWalkerVisualization(walker);\n740\t                        }\n741\t                    });\n742\t                }\n743\t\n744\t                // Check if simulation complete\n745\t                if (data.state === 'complete' || data.state === 'stopped') {\n746\t                    clearInterval(pollInterval);\n747\t                    await fetchSimulationResults();\n748\t                }\n749\t            } catch (err) {\n750\t                console.error('[Simulate] Failed to poll results:', err);\n751\t            }\n752\t        }, 200);\n753\t    }\n754\t\n755\t    async function fetchSimulationResults() {\n756\t        try {\n757\t            const response = await fetch('/api/simulator/results');\n758\t            if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch results');\n759\t\n760\t            const data = await response.json();\n761\t            state.simulationResults = data;\n762\t\n763\t console.error('[Simulate] Failed to fetch results:', err);\n769\t        }\n770\t    }\n771\t\n772\t    function displayResults(data) {\n773\t        if (elements.metricCoverage && data.mean_gdop) {\n778\t            elements.metricGdop.textContent = data.mean_gdop < 9999 ? data.mean_gdop.toFixed(2) : '∞';\n779\t        }\n780\t\n781\t        if (elements.metricBlobs && }\n807\t\n808\t    function displayShoppingList(data) {\n809\t        const shoppingContainer = document.getElementById('sim-shopping');\n810\t        const contentContainer = }\n846\t\n847\t        // Estimated cost\n848\t        if (data.estimated_cost_usd !== undefined) {\n849\t            html += `<div });\n872\t            html += `</div>`;\n873\t        }\n874\t\n875\t        // Coverage gaps\n876\t        if (data.coverage_gaps && data.coverage_gaps.length > 0) {\n877\t            html += `<div        html += `Search Hardware on Amazon &nearr;`;\n889\t            html += `</a>`;\n890\t        }\n891\t\n892\t        contentContainer.innerHTML = html;\n893\t\n894\t        // Attach handler for \"Add node here\" button\n895\t        const addHereBtn = document.getElementById('btn-add-node-here');\n896\t        if (addHereBtn) {\n897\t            addHereBtn.onclick =
